LORE_TABLET_0: I have existed since the creation of this world. Since then, I have not left this island.
LORE_TABLET_1: After all these centuries, I still do not know how I came to be or what I truly am.
LORE_TABLET_2: All I know is that my sole purpose is to bring balance to the elements.
LORE_TABLET_3: My power is connected to Harmony Island and so I must remain here.
LORE_TABLET_4: I have lived in peace with many generations of people who have inhabited this island.
LORE_TABLET_5: There are times when I wish that I could live a peaceful and uninterrupted life.
LORE_TABLET_7: Every time I fall into a deep slumber, I leave everyone around me behind.
LORE_TABLET_8: Every time I awaken from my slumber, I am greeted by a new set of faces. This is the life that I live.
LORE_TABLET_9: I remember when this island had no name; I only knew it as my home.
LORE_TABLET_10: The inhabitants named this land Harmony Island. I think it's a wonderful name.
LORE_TABLET_11: My power flows through the earth and the roots, keeping this land alive and thriving.
LORE_TABLET_12: Runes are created from my power and help everyone live more comfortable lives.
LORE_TABLET_13: Those who wish for too much power challenge me and my existence.
LORE_TABLET_14: Over centuries, I have had many conflicts with The Order of Influence.
LORE_TABLET_15: The Order is a group of misguided people who seek power and control.
LORE_TABLET_16: Since the beginning, The Order has wanted shadow magic to overpower all other elements.
LORE_TABLET_17: I will do everything in my power to stop The Order. I cannot allow them to succeed.
LORE_TABLET_18: The Order of Influence has not won yet, but I fear that one day they will.
LORE_TABLET_19: The Order grows stronger over time, making it more difficult to retain balance.
LORE_TABLET_20: When The Order’s power grows to dangerous levels, that is when I must step in.
LORE_TABLET_21: I have the power to cast great elemental storms to deter those who challenge me.
LORE_TABLET_22: Sometimes, even my storms cannot weaken The Order. As a last resort, I must use my ultimate ability.
LORE_TABLET_23: Many times in the past, The Order has provoked me to unleash my most powerful ability, resetting the balance of the world.
LORE_TABLET_24: Unleashing my ultimate ability drains my energy, causing me to fall into a deep slumber.
LORE_TABLET_25: Once I awaken from my slumber, it takes me a long time to regain my strength and resume my duties.
LORE_TABLET_26: I can feel a strange, negative energy that limits my power. This has not happened to me before.
LORE_TABLET_27: The Order must have placed a strong spell on me so that I cannot return to my true form.
LORE_TABLET_6: I have no other choice now. I need a powerful wizard to break these seals and help me regain my former power.

EG_GUARDIAN_24: I can feel my power returning quickly. Yes, my transformation has begun.
EG_GUARDIAN_25: The island, it calls for me. This is what I have been waiting for.
EG_NOOT_26: What's this? I can feel a great amount of magic building on Harmony Island.
EG_NOOT_27: The ground keeps trembling. It feels like something is about to happen. Hang on!
EG_NOOT_28: Look at that! I think The Ancient wants us to visit them again. Let's go!
EG_NOOT_29: Hmm, something definitely feels different than before. What could it be?
EG_NOOT_30: Hey, this path wasn't here before. This must have been what caused the earthquakes.
EG_NOOT_31: I can sense a strong magical presence coming from up there. Let's keep going.
EG_NOOT_32: Wow, The Ancient is GINORMOUS! I'm so glad that we were able to help them out.
EG_NOOT_33: We still have more to do, though. Let's go discover more mysteries on Harmony Island.
EG_GUARDIAN_26: Finally, I can return to my true form...
EG_GUARDIAN_27: This is what I truly am!
EG_GUARDIAN_28: How wonderful it is to be whole again. It has been centuries since I have felt so complete.
EG_GUARDIAN_29: Wizard, it is because of you that I can rejoice. You have done all this for me, and so I thank you deeply.
EG_GUARDIAN_30: However, our journey together must continue.
EG_GUARDIAN_31: My connection to the elements is still weak and I need your help to repair it. Here, please take this.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_ENCOUNTER_1: Welcome young wizard! This is the Grand Battle Arena where the most powerful wizards are created.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_ENCOUNTER_2: You have proven yourself to be worthy of challenging other wizards. A new journey of magic.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_ENCOUNTER_3:
Let me introduce myself.
I am *coughs* The Great Prince-E-Spell.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_ENCOUNTER_4: After winning many trophies, I now help other young wizards like you to do the same.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_ENCOUNTER_5: The Battle Arena was built to help wizards get stronger and challenge the Ancient!
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_LEAGUE_PLACEMENT_1: Welcome to the Arena! This is your progress. Earn more trophy points by challenging other players in the Battle Arena.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_LEAGUE_PLACEMENT_2: Lets find some players to challenge!
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_LEADERBOARD_INTRO: This is the leaderboard where you can see other players. Defeat players to earn your way to the top.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_LEADERBOARD_INTRO_REWAR: Here is a little reward to get you started. This is a magical rune. It will grant magical boosts to your team when used.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_RUNES_GATHERED: Well done! You have become so powerful. It’s time to go challenge the guardian and level up to the next tier of runes.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_RUNES_GATHERED_PORTAL: This is the portal to the Harmony Island. Let’s go!
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_RETURNING_PLAYER_1: Welcome back! Looks like your team was challenged by other wizards when you were away.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_RETURNING_PLAYER_2: Always remember to build a strong team to defend your position. Your new trophies are...
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_NO_RUNES_1: Who is the Ancient you ask? Well well you have a lot to learn wizard.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_NO_RUNES_2: Let’s go to Harmony Island. Click the portal to go now!
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_SEASON_PROGRESS_1: Welcome to the Arena! This is your Arena Progress. Earn more trophies in battles to unlock better rewards.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_SEASON_PROGRESS_2: Let's go find some players to challenge.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_SEASON_PROGRESS_3: This is the leaderboard where you can see other players.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_CHALLENGER_1: This is where you will find other wizards to challenge. Let's challenge the first wizard for now.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_CHALLENGER_2: When you are ready, click the Battle button.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_RUNES_INTRO_1: You can equip Runes. Here, let me show you how to do it.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_RUNES_INTRO_2: Select the rune to use it.
PVP_ARENA_MASTER_RUNES_INTRO_3: And we’re ready to go. Let’s find a worthy challenger!
SEASON_DETAILS_BUTTON_SUBTEXT: Battle other wizards to become number 1 of the season!
EG_GUARDIAN_32: Welcome to the fourth trial. Prepare yourself because this challenge won't be like the others.
EG_GUARDIAN_33: Well then, it looks like my new abilities couldn't shake you. Very good.
EG_GUARDIAN_34: As you pass my trials, I am able to regain my elemental powers.
EG_GUARDIAN_35: With my powers back, I can help protect the world from The Order of Influence once again.
EG_GUARDIAN_36: They have tried to overpower me countless times over the centuries, but I will not let them win this time.
EG_GUARDIAN_37: There are not many wizards that are as brave as you. Let us begin the fifth trial.
EG_GUARDIAN_38: Marvelous. I can feel the elements on the tips of my fingers. What a great feeling indeed.
EG_GUARDIAN_39: With these hands, I used to help the people on this island build amazing villages.
EG_GUARDIAN_40: Those people have long since left, but I still wish to become a being capable of protecting this world.
EG_GUARDIAN_41: I want to welcome new villagers, but I need my powers back first. I need you to pass my sixth trial.
EG_GUARDIAN_42: This is it. Complete this sixth trial and my powers will finally be returned to me.
EG_GUARDIAN_43: You have freed me from the seals, released my true form and repaired my connection to the elements.
EG_GUARDIAN_44: You have done all of this for me and so I consider you, wizard, one of my dearest friends. Thank you.
EG_GUARDIAN_45: It is truly wonderful to have a friend again. Please accept this as a symbol of our friendship.
EG_GUARDIAN_46: Now, I believe I should tell you my real name. From now on, you may call me Harmony.
EG_GUARDIAN_47: That is the name that the Harmony Island villagers gave me a long, long time ago.
EG_GUARDIAN_48: Well, it is finally time that I leave this spot and explore the world for myself. There is so much to learn.
EG_GUARDIAN_49: We must grow stronger to prepare for what may come. Let us make this world a better place for everyone.
EG_NOOT_34: It looks like everyone has room to grow, even The Ancient.
EG_NOOT_35: Let's help The Ancient get all their powers back. The world is depending on you!
EG_NOOT_36: That's right, I remember now. In the past, Harmony Island used to be home to many people.
EG_NOOT_37: They left their things behind so that people like us could learn about their culture. That is so cool!
EG_NOOT_38: The Ancient – I mean Harmony – they must have been really lonely all this time.
EG_NOOT_39: It's all thanks to you that Harmony can be free again to travel the world.
EG_NOOT_40: We have a lot of exploring and learning to do as well. I just know that we'll see them again someday.
EG_GUARDIAN_50: I am depending on you. Through my trials, both you and I will grow stronger.
EG_NOOT_SPELL_LOCKED: The Ancient locked this spell for a few turns. Only they can unlock it.
HARMONY_ISLAND_PART_2_AD_BODY: Your ultimate test awaits! Get ready for Harmony Island's next chapter.
EG_NOOT_ON_FAINT: That was a tough one. Don't worry, I'll bring you back to safety and heal your whole team.

TOWER_EXIT_ADA: Find the key to Ada's office!
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_1: Ah, you’re finally here. I was starting to think that the Puppet Master caught you too.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_2: It’s been too long, Noot. Don’t worry about me. I’m not in any danger.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_3: We all have our strengths… and weaknesses to work on. Currently, however, I’m locked in my office without the key.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_4: Knowing the Puppet Master, they must have hidden the key at the top of the tower on the 8th floor. Do you think you’ll be able to retrieve it?
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_5: I expected no less from you, old friend. You have my gratitude.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_6: Wizard, a moment please. The Ice Tower has been overrun with monsters under the influence of Shadow magic.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_7: The Puppet Master doesn’t like to make these things easy, you know.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_9: I’m impressed. You made that first floor look easy, as expected of a wizard trained under Noot.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_10: Ah yes, the 3rd floor. My students would make a big mess while they practiced here.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_11: Being trapped for so long, I rather miss those snow-filled classrooms.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_12: I can feel the Shadow magic slowly being lifted from the tower. You’re doing a great job.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_13: When I’m finally out of here, we’re going to have to teach the Puppet Master a lesson for all the trouble they’ve caused.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_14: You’ve reached the 5th floor, I sense. You’re halfway to the top.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_15: Ah, the 6th floor. Bok would always secretly come here to have snow battles with the students.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_16: I suppose learning should be fun as well.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_17: You’re almost on the 8th floor. Don’t give up now. I’m counting on you.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_18: I can sense that you’ve reached the 8th floor. The key must be around there somewhere.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_19: Umm, excuse me for interrupting, but we seem to have a visitor, and they don’t look very friendly.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_20: Me neither. This Glacias just suddenly appeared out of a Shadow portal.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_21: Be careful. There’s something different about this one… I believe it’s been created by Shadow magic.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_22: That’s better. It’s nice to finally be able to stretch my arms again.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_23: With you two on the job, I knew I could chill.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_24: Other Wardens may still need help, however, so you’ll need to recover keystones from each zone to enter each Warden’s tower.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_25: To show my thanks, I have something for you. Now hop to it, Blizzhared, and help this brave wizard on their journey!
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_26: I can still feel the Shadow in the air, so I know that the Puppet Master must be planning something.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_27: Us Wardens must prepare for the next steps. I'll wait in the common room for them.
DIALOGUE_ADA_ICETOWER_28: Thank you for all your hard work, wizard. The Wardens are in your debt.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_1: We have what we need to enter the Ice Tower in the Academy. Let’s go check it out!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_2: I can already feel a chill from the Ice Tower door unlocking! I wish I’d brought mittens…
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_3: Brrr, it’s so cold in here. We’re in the Ice Tower alright.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_4: Wizards come here to study Ice magic. That’s why there’s so much snow everywhere.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_5: Ada! I’m so happy that we finally found you. Well, almost…
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_6: I had no doubt about that. You’re definitely the toughest of the 5 Wardens.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_7: Don’t worry about it! We can get the key and get you out of there.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_8: Alright! Let’s take the Ice Tower elevator and make our way to the 8th floor to find that key!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_9: Don’t worry about it, Ada. We should be able to handle it, no problem.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_10: Oh, you’re too kind. Well, we still have 7 floors to go, so let’s keep our eyes on the prize.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_11: That’s right! We only have 4 more floors to go. Let’s keep going!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_12: Don’t worry, Ada. There’s no way we’re backing out now!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_13: That’s it! That’s the key we need to rescue Ada!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_14: Hurry, let’s head back to the common room and unlock that door!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_15: Oh no! Hold on Ada! We’re coming as fast as we can!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_16: We should go help Ada first.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_17: That is not what I was hoping to see.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_18: Uh oh, looks like we need to battle this Shadow Glacias to get to Ada. Let’s do this!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_19: You did it! You really did it!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_20: Ada, you’re okay! I got so worried back there.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_21: Now you’re one step closer to stopping the Puppet Master and their evil plans.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ICETOWER_22: The Ice Tower is in good hands, so let’s see what else we need to do.

DIALOGUE_NOOT_SHIVERCHILL_2: Let's return the gem to its pedestal in the Academy!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_SHIVERCHILL_3: Let's return the gem to its pedestal in the Academy!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_SHIVERCHILL_4: Follow me! I'll take you right to the pedestal room!
DIALOGUE_BOK_40: Place gem on pedestal in Academy and Bok give you special wand!
DIALOGUE_BOK_41: Hahaha! Hero found Shiverchill Gem! Place gem on pedestal in Academy and Bok give you special wand!
DIALOGUE_BOK_42: Wow, you quick. Here is special wand as promised!

CONFIRM_REPORT: Do you want to report this house for being inappropriate?
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_1: Hello, young wizard! I travel around studying the wonderful creatures I've found.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_2: Have you heard of the Mythical Epics? They're definitely near. I've followed their trail in hopes they'll appear.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_3: There is something else that I've noticed too. They seem different from the Epics we knew.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_4: My studies can help me to track them for you. If you wish to find one then bring me some clues.

 Play the next season in the Arena soon!

REPORT_MODAL_DISCRIPTION: Select your reason for reporting this player.  Only report a player if they are doing something from the list below:
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_IDLE_1: Whenever I play a song on my flute, it will draw in curious creatures so cute!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_IDLE_2: Hmm... Yes... I see... Oh! Sorry about that, according to this calculation, we're close to figuring out their location!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_IDLE_3: Oh, hello again! Would you care for a treat? They're my favourite snack, so soft and so sweet!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_MAGMAYHEM_1: All because of Magmayhem’s heat, it makes charcoal out of whatever they eat.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_MAGMAYHEM_2: Magmayhem creates fireballs so hot, it burns through everything your enemy's got!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_MAGMAYHEM_3: Magmayhem came from an active volcano, which once erupted a long time ago.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_BEGIN_TRADE: It looks like you've collected some curious things. Excellent work! Now, what did you bring?
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_END_TRADE: Goodbye young wizard! If you find some more clues, then next time we meet, I'll use them to locate the Epic you seek!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_TRADE_ITEM_1: Now that we know its favorite food, I'll pinpoint a likely location for you.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_TRADE_ITEM_2: I'll crack this rock open so I can begin, what's inside can tell me where they have been.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_TRADE_ITEM_3: An excellent find! It's really quite neat, to do this would need some serious heat.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_ULTIMATE_TAMING_LOSS_1: Looks like you didn’t tame the Mythical Epic in time and it has run away. You should find it again to tame it.

DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_ARCTURION_1: Arcturion’s cannon doesn’t need to reload, he uses his magic to make it explode.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_ARCTURION_2: Arcturion’s fur is so coarse and so thick that no cold can reach him, but he overheats quick.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_ARCTURION_3: In winter is when bears will usually sleep, but for Arcturion it’s in summer his slumber is deep.

DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SHIVERSCORCH_1: They share a body but are actually twins, I wonder where Shiver ends and Scorch begins?
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SHIVERSCORCH_2: Shiver & Scorch are fire and ice, but their body is water to keep their temperature nice.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SHIVERSCORCH_3: When you are facing them you must be precise, using Storm would be my advice.
ULTIMATES_FEW_DAYS_LEFT: Only a few days left! But I'll be back later!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_AQUADILE_1: Aquadile really loves to play, and surf around on their whirlpool all day.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_AQUADILE_2: Aquadile collects trinkets and shiny things, stuff like coins, marbles, mirrors, and rings.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_AQUADILE_3: Aquadile uses it’s shiny things, to make its fins golden like the crowns of kings.
TITAN_HEALTH_AD_BODY_100: Join the battle to earn Titan Shards!
TITAN_HEALTH_AD_BODY_75: Bam! Good start. Keep the battle going to earn Titan Shards!
TITAN_HEALTH_AD_BODY_50: Half way there! Battle the Titan to keep earning Titan Shards!
TITAN_HEALTH_AD_BODY_25: The Titan is almost defeated! Keep battling it to earn bonus Titan Shards!
WEEKLY_CHALLENGE_DIALOG_REWARD: Battle Enemies and Win Awesome Rewards!
WEEKLY_CHALLENGE_REWARD_DIALOGUE: You got your reward for completing your weekly challenge!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_NEBULA_1: Nebula loves to play between the moon and stars, charging its energy from clouds near and far.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_NEBULA_2: Nebula has a spring in its step, searching for treats in the forest it likes best.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_NEBULA_3: Nebula is a mighty dragon, standing strong in battle long after others are done.
UI_TITAN_SHARDS_INFO_TO2: Battle the Titan to earn Titan Shards. You can't do it alone though. It is SO strong, that MANY wizards around the world will need to work together to defeat it!
DIALOGUE_HARVEY_6: Win lots of battles against the Titan to get a BUNCH of titan shards!

DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BLASTSTAR_1: Blast star is a battle machine, charging up bolts so powerful your opponents won't see it coming.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BLASTSTAR_2: With powerful jets on its back the flying Blast Star makes for a difficult target to attack.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BLASTSTAR_3: Blast Star may look big and powerful in battle but loves spending its free time making art that is beautiful.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_EVOLUTION: Good job! Your pet has just leveled up! To evolve your pet into an even cooler one, keep it on your team during battle to continue leveling it up.
ALREADY_USED_FREE_EVOLUTION_TEXT: You have already used your free one-time evolution.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_LUMANIGHT_1: Hiding through the winters nowhere to be seen, the Lumanight enjoys the summers chasing the sun's beam.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_LUMANIGHT_2: Legend says the Lumanight has eaten a 1000 suns, get it on your team for some flaming fun!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_LUMANIGHT_3: Lumanight loves to sleep, dreaming all day of its favourite treats.
PET_EVOLVED_INTO_FREE_EVOLUTION: You used your one-time evolution gift to evolve {0} to {1}!

DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_RIPTIDE_1: Every large wave is caused by a Riptide chasing fishes out of its cave!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_RIPTIDE_2: Ripping through the air and water, Riptide finds special treasures to grow its power.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_RIPTIDE_3: Riptide can be very playful, but make it angry and it will roll into a whirlpool.
ULTIMATES_CHOOSE_A_MYTHIC: I need to choose a Mythic to try a battle!
ULTIMATES_UNTAMED_NEXT_TIME: Continue taming {0} when it comes back next time.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BLUEFURYMAGMAYHEM: The cold flames of Bluefury Magmayhem hide powerful secrets of the fire magic.
The origins of Bluefury is a mystery, so similar to Magmayhem but more ... more ... more fury!
Bluefury Magmayhem is seen in caves so old, but sometimes in firefly looking for gold.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_VEGABLOOM_1: Vegabloom is often seen drinking water by the lakes in the forest; growing flowers on its tail are the best!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_VEGABLOOM_2: Vegabloom is easily distracted by the butterflies following it around, chasing them through the fields till a warm spot is found.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_VEGABLOOM_3: Vegabloom is a really happy buddy, jumping around with a big smile always in a hurry.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_GRYPHROOM_1: Gryphroom is a hard to find Mythic as it blends in with the forest where mushrooms are thick.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_GRYPHROOM_2: Gryphroom shies away on a bright sunny day but on a full moon night they howl away!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_GRYPHROOM_3: Gryphrooms are slow to trust a wizard, but treat them well and they will show you a forest's secrets.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SOLAR_1: Solar is such a beautiful creature, a little sun and puffy clouds is its mixture.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SOLAR_2: Solar and Nebula find their flow, creating an eclipse on the zones below.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SOLAR_3: Solar loves to nibble on everything, its sharp teeth can really sting!
UI_ZONE_GO_RESCUE_MORE_PETS: Go and explore to rescue more pets!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_GLIMMERWING_1: Glimmerwing is quick to pose, always getting your attention and keeping you close.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_GLIMMERWING_2: Glimmerwing wants to be cuddled, a perfect pet for your bed time snuggle.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_GLIMMERWING_3: Glimmerwing is cute to see, but in battle it is an icy enemy!
BATTLE_REVAMP_TUTORIAL_2: Select a target for your spell.
BATTLE_REVAMP_TUTORIAL_3:
You're out of Magic.

BATTLE_REVAMP_TUTORIAL_4:

Use it to cast more spells.
BATTLE_REVAMP_TUTORIAL_6:
Whoa!
That was a powerful hit!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BARKBARIAN_1: Barkbarian may look like a meanie, but get to know him and you'll see he's a sweetie.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BARKBARIAN_2: His shield is strong and his body is tough, if you try to beat him, it's sure to be rough.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BARKBARIAN_3: He fights for honor, he fight for glory, maybe so people will tell his story.

DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_PYRODILE_1: Pyrodile loves anything that shines, like gems that are found inside of the mines.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_PYRODILE_2: Pyrodile really likes a thrill, so will surf on lava coming downhill.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_PYRODILE_3: Twirling and twisting around it goes, a tornado of fire to fight it's foes.

DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST1REVISION_1:
Oh, good, a wizard!
We need your help.
The forest is being attacked.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST1REVISION_2: It's the Puppet Master's shadow magic. Only the Firefly Keystone can clear it from the forest.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST1REVISION_3: You could be the one! Every time you battle monsters that are under the shadow magic's control you get stronger.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BUZZRA_1: This Mythic Epic flutters and flies, through stormy weather and thundering skies.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BUZZRA_2: Buzzra is known for being fast, it zips on by with a flicker and flash.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_BUZZRA_3: The scales of its wings can cause a spark, that helps to light its way in the dark.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST1REVISION_COMPLETE: Ahh! I see after battling those monsters you are stronger already.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST2REVISION_1: The forest was so happy before the Puppet Master's shadow magic put a spell on the creatures.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST2REVISION_2:
My fairy friends are so scared. A big monster has been creating trouble.
Can you help us?
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST2REVISION_BATTLE: This monster is a higher level than you. Can you battle it? I'll do what I can to help, but be careful!
BATTLE_REVAMP_ERROR_NETWORK: As we try to fix the problem, please check your internet connection
BATTLE_REVAMP_ERROR_RETRY: Please wait as we try to fix the problem
BATTLE_REVAMP_ERROR_FATAL: The battle is about to end
DIALOGUE_NOOT_HOUSE_END_TO_FIREFLY: Hmm... I remember it being said that the fairies of Firefly forest are wise. Maybe we will learn something there.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_HYDROID_1: With a whirl and a twirl, Hydroid dives into the sea, to keep the waters clean and free.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_HYDROID_2: Hydroid is a deep sea friend, helping the ocean and its creatures again and again.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_HYDROID_3: With propellers swift, and lights that glow bright, Hydroid can even do rescues at night.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST2REVISION_COMPLETE1: That was good. It ran away but when you find this one again, it will be stronger.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST2REVISION_COMPLETE3: Battle monsters to level up. You can even break the Puppet Master's spell and rescue them.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST3REVISION_START1: So let's explore the forest and find the source of the shadow magic.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST3REVISION_MONSTERINF: GASP! There is the monster from before. It has gotten stronger.
I don't have any more of the level up magic. Let's battle other monsters first so you get stronger.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST3REVISION_WIN1: Amazing! You have grown so much since we first met.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST3REVISION_WIN2: In this magical forest and beyond, many great adventures are waiting for you and I know you are ready!
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST3REVISION_LOSS1: Hey wizard, we only really lose if we stop trying. C'mon let's try again.
BATTLE_REVAMP_EXISTING_USER_TUTORIAL_1:
Let me show you how new
battles work!
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST3REVISION_BOSSREADY: You have increased your level. Now you are ready to battle the BIG ONE!
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST2REVISION_MIDBATTLE_: Hey wizard, this monster is definitely a higher level than you.
Luckily I have been saving this level up magic. It's rare, but I can gift it to you.
Now you have levelled up and are stronger. Good luck battling the monster!

DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_LUNA_1: With tarot cards or crystal ball, Luna's fortune telling reveals all.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_LUNA_2: Luna likes to be out at night, flying around in the moonlight.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_LUNA_3: Luna knows what's yet to come, and used her visions to help everyone.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SPLASHSPARK_1: Two heads are better than one, that's why this Mythic is so much fun!
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SPLASHSPARK_2: These two siblings are as close as can be, and do battle together in harmony.
DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SPLASHSPARK_3: One is brave, the other is bold, and they never back down, or so I am told.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST4REVISION_INTRO1: All this battling - it's getting dangerous! We will need friends.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST4REVISION_INTRO2: My brother, Florian, is also looking for the keystone. Let's find him.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST6REVISION_INTRO1: Wizard, there you are! We need to hurry. The Puppet Master is back in Firefly Forest and he has trapped Florian.
DIALOGUE_BOK_QUEST6REVISION_INTRO2:
Puppet Master in Firefly?! Bok could feel the shadow magic growing.
It caused the snow storms keeping us here.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST6REVISION_INTRO3: If we clear enough of the shadow magic in Firefly Forest, we will stop the snow storm in Shiverchill Mountains.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST6REVISION_INTRO4: Let's go and see what you and your ice pet can do.
DIALOGUE_PUPPETMASTER_QUEST6REVISION_PRE:
Finally, Pippet!
Keep everyone away from the keystones. No one learns but me!
DIALOGUE_FLORIAN_QUEST6REVISION_PREBATTL: Why can only you learn, Puppet Master? What are you afraid of? Learning is for everyone.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST6REVISION_PREBATTLE4: Yeah and the Puppet Master is about to learn a lesson!
DIALOGUE_PUPPETMASTER_QUEST6REVISION_PRE: I'll see you again, but now I'm going to spread the shadow magic here, in Shiverchill, Bonfire Spire ... EVERYWHERE!
DIALOGUE_PIPPET_QUEST6REVISION_PREBATTLE:
Time to battle.
Hehe! The Puppet Master will be proud of me.
DIALOGUE_PIPPET_QUEST6REVISION_POSTBATTL: Oh no not again! You are a very annoying wizard.
If it wasn't for that Ice pet, I would have won.

There is so much you have not learned yet. The Puppet Master has other big plans!
Masterrrrrrr...

There is so much you have not learned yet. The Puppet Master has other big plans!
Masterrrrrrr...
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST6REVISION_POSTBATTLE:
Florian, are you hurt?
I'm happy you are safe.
So... where is my thank you?
DIALOGUE_FLORIAN_QUEST6REVISION_POSTBATT: No time. When I was in the shadow magic, I think I saw the Puppet Master ... putting rocks to sleep?
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST6REVISION_POSTBATTLE:
What? That makes no sense -- Oh wait!
There is a rock-man called Gerald.
Hope he is okay.
DIALOGUE_FLORIAN_QUEST6REVISION_POSTBATT:
I hope so too. Let's split up for now.
I'll go check on the fairies.
You keep going through Firefly!
DIALOGUE_FLORIAN_QUEST4REVISION_OUTRO_1: Hey Flora! Sigh. What did you do this time?
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST4REVISION_OUTRO_2:
It's time to team up. The wizard and I are looking for the keystone, too.
Come on, let's go!
DIALOGUE_FLORIAN_QUEST4REVISION_OUTRO_3: Woah! Woah! Slow down. You are going to need an ice pet first. They are strong against the plant monsters around here.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST5REVISION_INTRO_1:
Oh, an ice pet?!
Cool! Where do we get one?
DIALOGUE_FLORIAN_QUEST5REVISION_INTRO_2: Oh, aren't you excited! Go meet my friend, Bok, in Shiverchill. I have helped him before, so it's his turn now.
DIALOGUE_BOK_QUEST5REVISION_GIFT_1: Hahaa! Small wizard. Drink some hot chocolate, it will make you big.
DIALOGUE_BOK_QUEST5REVISION_GIFT_2: Huh! You want ice pet? Is this my turn to help Florian? It's Florian's turn to give Bok hot chocolate.
DIALOGUE_BOK_QUEST5REVISION_GIFT_3: Haha. Bok only joking. Of course Bok help. Here is a strong one.

ZONE_LOCKED_SEQUENCE_2:
Well, not anymore!
HA HA HA

ZONE_LOCKED_SEQUENCE_5: *Sigh* What am I going to do with you?

DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_NOOT_PEDISTALS_FIXED: I have good news! Gale fixed the pedestals in the Academy!

WORLD_MAP_SPEECH_BUBBLE_ENDGAME: Let's hurry to the Academy and teach the Puppet Master a lesson!
PUPPETMASTER_ZONE_UNLOCKED_SHIVERCHILL: You may have opened Shiverchill Mountains, but I doubt you can open the next one.
PUPPETMASTER_ZONE_UNLOCKED_BONFIRE: What's happening? Impossible! You just broke my spell and opened up Bonfire Spire! But don't think this is the end, I always win.
PUPPETMASTER_ZONE_UNLOCKED_SHIPWRECK: You did it again!? How annoying. You removed my spell from Shipwreck Shore! Why do you keep getting in my way?
PUPPETMASTER_ZONE_UNLOCKED_SKYWATCH: How did I not see this coming? I tried so hard.

ZONE_UNLOCKED_EXPLORE_SHIPWRECK: Help Eve find the sea monster.
ZONE_UNLOCKED_EXPLORE_SKYWATCH: Help Benni fix the weather machines.
ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_BATTLE_FIREFLY_NPC_2: No, it's not! It's an illusion that we'll brush aside with Plant power!

Haha! Bok know just the thing to help wizard.
ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_BATTLE_BONFIRE_NPC_2: Not to worry, my tired sidekick! Slurpy the Talented has just the snack that will pick you right up!
ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_BATTLE_SHIPWRECK_NPC_1: Hold on a minute, kid. During all my sailing, I found something that should prove useful here.
ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_BATTLE_SHIPWRECK_NPC_2: Ever wanted to cast the All Out Attack right away? Well now you can!
ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_BATTLE_SKYWATCH_NPC_1: Ugh, not this cloud AGAIN. I wonder if I can get rid of its shield...
ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_BATTLE_SKYWATCH_NPC_2: Broccolina, that's not how you do it! Don't you remember what gramps taught us?
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_POST_PIPPET_BATTLE_1: Oh no, the Puppet Master will not like this...
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_POST_PIPPET_BATTLE_2: It’s now time to use the power of the keystones against that dastardly Puppet Master!
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST9REVISION_2: The Puppet Master's shadow magic put Gerald to sleep. It's just like Florian's dream!
DIALOGUE_POST_ENDGAME_NOOT_TITAN_INTRO_2: Whoa, there’s a Titan! Titan magic is thousands of years old. They were here before the Puppet Master was even a student wizard.
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_NOOT_ACADEMY_INTRO: Let's hurry up to the pedestals and place the keystones. We'll help Gale out later.
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_1_PRE_BATTLE_P: You didn't think I'd let you use the keystones, did you?!?
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_2_PRE_BATTLE_P: What happened?!? Did you somehow trick pooooooor Gerald?
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_3_PRE_BATTLE_P: Persistent, aren't you? Well, you won't like this main course!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_2_PUPPETMASTER: Come, Wyrm, and chill their bones!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_1_PUPPETMASTER: I have a… shadowy surprise for you!!!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_3_PUPPETMASTER: Cebollini, show them what’s for dinner!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_4_PUPPETMASTER: The Old One gives even me the creeps, so I'm sure your quest will end here, little wizard!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_GUARDIAN_5_PUPPETMASTER: You won’t be able to defeat what you can’t hit… will you?
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_ROUND_1_D: Prepare yourself, wizard! I have a few tricks up my sleeve that will leave you amazed!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_ROUND_3_D: Ahahaha, try not to hit your own friends too hard!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_ROUND_4_D: You don't stand a chance against my magic!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_ROUND_5_D: What your shadow magic destroys, our astral powers can restore!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_ROUND_6_D: Gah, I don't understand how a puny wizard like you keeps fighting!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_ROUND_8_D: Fancy spells won't save you now!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_ROUND_10_: Give up! My shadow magic is just too powerful!
Yeah, right! You're on your last legs, Puppet Master!
Wait... are there even legs under that robe?
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_ROUND_11_: You are strong, but not strong enough!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_ROUND_12_: That's it, we're almost there! Just keep casting!
TOWER_TOWN_MAP_DESC_POST_ENDGAME: The Floatlings need you! Help the Floatlings rebuild their towers and grow magical Lumin Trees once again!
DIALOGUE_TOWER_TOWN_TUTORIAL_POST_ENDGAM: The Puppet Master destroyed the towers, but he’s gone now too. That means I’m free to turn the pets of the island into my minions!
Did I say that out loud? Mwa ha ha ha!
DIALOG_ENDGAME_PRE_PIPPET_BATTLE: No, I won't let you use the power of the keystones against us!
TT_POST_ENDGAME_SHROUD_TUTORIAL_DIALOGUE: The Stubborn Shadow can make shrouds appear to block you from building when not enough spells are cast.
TT_POST_ENDGAME_ROOFTOP_TUTORIAL_DIALOGU: Not so fast! I won’t let you rebuild these towers quite so easily!!
Soon this island will be mine! HAHAHAHAHA!
DIALOGUE_GERALD_QUEST12REVISION_1:
I'm...free.
I...didn't give the Puppet Master... the keystone. Then he got mad and...I...can't remember.
DIALOGUE_GERALD_QUEST12REVISION_3:
I like wizard!
Thanks for saving me...I have a gift for you...
DIALOGUE_GERALD_QUEST12REVISION_4: Fernscale Armor helps protect you more in battles... You will be solid as a stone. Few were ever made so it's hard to find.
DIALOGUE_GERALD_QUEST12REVISION_5: More rare items are usually very useful. Look for them in chests and other hiding places.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST12REVISION_1:
Gerald, you boulder-head! I'm so happy you're back!
This wizard helped me break the spell.

Great, you have the new armour with you! Good gear makes you stronger and will help you remove the shadow magic!
IT'S FREEZING HERE! Need to check on furnaces, but room full of chilly monsters...
PET_MAX_LEVEL_UP_TO_SAME_LEVEL_ONLY: You can only level up pets to the same level as your wizard.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST12REVISION_2: Thank you so much for rescuing the forest, wizard! That was an excellent adventure and we make a great team.
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST12REVISION_3: Wizard, I want you to know that I'll always be your friend and you're always welcome here!
DIALOGUE_FLORA_QUEST12REVISION_4: Sure, the weather is not as nice at Shiverchill Mountains but I know your adventure is going to be amazing!
DIALOGUE_FLORIAN_QUEST12REVISION_1:
Yes, WE make a great team.
Oh! Bok says the snowstorm is finally over and they need you in Shiverchill Mountains.

DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_WORLD_MAP_NOOT: With the power of the keystones, we can finally free the Academy!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_KEYSTONE_HYPE: This is the moment we've been waiting for!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_NOOT_PEDISTALS_FIXED_AC: I have some great news, young wizard! We can FINALLY use all the keystones!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_NOOT_TEACH_PUPPET_MASTE: Let's hurry and teach the Puppet Master a lesson!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPETMASTER_PRE_BATTLE: That does it! I guess some things you just have to take care of yourself!
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_PUPPET_MASTER_DEATH: Nooo, I was so close to getting all that magic for myself...
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_STORY_PANEL_1: The Puppet Master was finally defeated, leaving behind just his staff and clothes.
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_STORY_PANEL_2: But as the young wizard looked into the elemental keystones, images of the missing Wardens mysteriously shone through...
DIALOGUE_ENDGAME_STORY_PANEL_3: There was no time to investigate, though. The gates to the Academy burst open, and all the wizard's friends were ready to celebrate!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_1: Well done! I knew you'd be able to win!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_2: According to my calculations, the outcome was never in doubt!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_3: Haha, wizard beat Puppet-guy! Bok proud of wizard!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_4: Good job, kid. I can once again sail The Seven Seas!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_5: Slurpy the Wise did a great job teaching his loyal sidekick – just look at the results!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_6: Yes Slurpy, we totally couldn't have done it without you...
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_7: Aaaaaanyway, the Puppet Master might be gone, but the fight against darkness is not over!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_8: The Wardens are still missing, hidden by the same shadow that gave the Puppet Master his power.
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_9: We must continue bringing light to the world, and get rid of the darkness once and for all!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_10: But for now... it's time to CELEBRATE!!!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_PEDESTAL_1: You got the keystones back, but where are the Wardens?
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_PEDESTAL_2: I can see glimpses of them shining through! Perhaps if we bring enough light to drive away the shadow, their locations will be revealed!

DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_FIREFLY_1: The Puppet Master's shadow curse has spread through the forest, turning the once-friendly monsters against you!
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_FIREFLY_2: You must find the Firefly keystone. Its power will help you defeat the forces of shadow!
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_FIREFLY_3: Battle against the forces of the Puppet Master! Every time you battle, you will get stronger.
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_BONFIRE_1: Volcanoes filled with lava swimming pools and fire dragons. Battle and collect pets of fire magic!
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_BONFIRE_2: Queen Goo-lia loves food and has parties for her friends. Bring her tasty treats and she may invite you.
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_BONFIRE_3: The Puppet Master needs the power of the Bonfire keystone. Get it first and it will help you defeat him!
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_SHIVERCHILL: Shiverchill Mountains are full of new monsters to battle and collect. Go find the power of ice magic!
But be careful of powerful monsters that protect the great treasures hidden in these mountains.
The Puppet Master wants to control it all. Find the Shiverchill keystone to spoil his plans!
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_SHIPWRECK_1: Explore a world below the land, where amazing deep ocean water pets can put out fires anywhere.
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_SHIPWRECK_2: The ocean has many secrets and lost treasures, with powerful beasts that can snap a ship in two.
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_SHIPWRECK_3: If you find the Shipwreck keystone, its power will help you beat the Puppet Master!
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_SKYWATCH_1: Skywatch, like its name, watches over all the world from above and controls the weather.
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_SKYWATCH_2: Rare pets fly through the clouds collecting storm power. Battle and collect pets of storm magic!
DIALOGUE_NARRATOR_ZONE_ENTRY_SKYWATCH_3: The Puppet Master thinks he can use the weather to help him, but that won't happen if you get the Skywatch keystone!

DIALOGUE_WANDERER_LORE_SHIMMERSTORM_3: It shimmers, that's the norm. This Mythic's name is Shimmerstorm.

DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_INTRO_1: Hi! My name is Noot. I help bring new students to the Wizard Academy on their first day of class!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_INTRO_2: Let’s go to the Academy now.
DIALOGUE_THEO_FTUE_GREAT_HALL_1: Hi, are you the new wizard? My name is Theo, I’m a student here too, nice to meet you!
DIALOGUE_THEO_FTUE_GREAT_HALL_2: Magic battles are the most fun way to learn! You can practice casting spells on me if you want.
DIALOGUE_THEO_FTUE_GREAT_HALL_3: What's that? You don't have a wand? That's okay. Here, take my old one.
DIALOGUE_THEO_FTUE_BATTLE_1: Great! You've got it. I have to get to class now. See you later, friend.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_BATTLE_1: The Puppet Master's magic has turned the pets against us!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_BATTLE_2: Use your own magic to break the spell and rescue the pet.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_BATTLE_3: Quick, let’s get out of here!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_GREAT_HALL_2_1: Woah! You're a quick learner! I think you're ready for your first pet.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_GREAT_HALL_2_2: I can tell you two are going to be great friends.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_GREAT_HALL_2_3: You can keep them safe in your Petbook for now, and they will come to help you in battles.
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_FTUE_1: It is finally done. With the Keystones destroyed, no one will EVER be able to enter the Academy and fill their minds with knowledge.
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_FTUE_2: And without knowledge, they will not be able to resist our mind illusions!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FTUE_HOUSE_END_1: I have a little secret I was keeping from the Puppet Master: the Keystones can't be destroyed!

DIALOGUE_NOOT_POST_FIRST_RIFT_1: WOW! That was amazing! Where did we just go? And did you see that rare pet?
DIALOGUE_NOOT_POST_FIRST_RIFT_2: I bet we can find more rare pets in there if we keep looking! We just need more of those keys.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_POST_FIRST_RIFT_3_BEFORE_P: But don't forget we still need to find all the Keystones! Everyone is counting on us!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_POST_FIRST_RIFT_3_AFTER_PM: And as soon as this portal hopping grants us a Dragon Orb, we'll be able to battle one of those giant beasts!
ENDGAME_POST_PUPPET_MASTER_9_DRAGON_ISLE: And I sense a new presence over at Dragon Isle. We should check that out next!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FIRST_RIFT_KEY_OBTAINED: Huh, I wonder what that strange key unlocks.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FIRST_DRAGON_ORB_1: That's it! We got our first Dragon Orb!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_FIRST_DRAGON_ORB_2: Now we've just to got to use it to find our first dragon!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_POST_FIRST_RIFT_4_AFTER_PM: That will surely help us get stronger to fight the Puppet Master again!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_DRAGON_ISLE_REVEAL_1: Wow, is that the Dragon Isle? I thought it was just a legend!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_DRAGON_ISLE_REVEAL_2: Why did it show up now? Does this have something to do with the keystones?
DIALOGUE_NOOT_DRAGON_ISLE_REVEAL_3: Well, now that it's here, let's check it out. I heard that some rare pets live there!
LET_GO_FOREVER_WARNING_PET_SLOTS: You will lose {0} and 1 pet slot. You cannot undo this action.
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_DRAGON_ISLE_PRE_P: Pippet, look at these dragons! With my shadow magic and their strength, I'll be unbeatable!
DIALOGUE_PIPPET_DRAGON_ISLE_PRE_PM_VISIT: But master, these are just little dragons. How will they make us so strong?
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_DRAGON_ISLE_PRE_P: Oh, Pippet, you lack vision! We will raise them to be mighty. No one will dare to challenge us then!
DIALOGUE_PIPPET_DRAGON_ISLE_PRE_PM_VISIT: Uh, master, isn’t it a lot of work to raise dragons?
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_DRAGON_ISLE_PRE_P: Ridiculous! It’ll be easy for a powerful wizard like me.
Ouch! Stop that biting right now!
Ewww! Did that one just poop on my robes?
Alright! That does it! Pippet, we're leaving!
The wizards will never gather all the keystones anyway, and I need a long bath.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_DRAGON_ISLE_PRE_PM_VISIT_1: Hah, that no good Puppet Master got exactly what he deserved!
Let's check out that mysterious portal next!
I think that strange key you found might fit into that pedestal next to it!
SEGMENTED_OFFERS_HEADER: Unlock special rewards for a limited time!
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_: Pippet, where is my new outfit?!?
DIALOGUE_PIPPET_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_PM_VISI: Oooh, that young wizard makes me so angry, stealing your fancy robes like that!
I tried to warn you not to take them lightly…
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_: Are YOU giving ME advice now?!?
DIALOGUE_PIPPET_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_PM_VISI: N-no, of course not! B-but... what will we do?
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_: Dragons, Pippet! We'll use the dragons! Now, come with me!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_PM_VISIT_: I hear someone coming! Quick, hide!
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_: With these special Dragon Orbs, that portal will take us straight to the most powerful dragons!
DIALOGUE_PIPPET_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_PM_VISI: Amazing! And they'll just come and help us?
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_: No, of course not, you dolt!
We'll need to tame them first, so you'd better bring your strongest minions!
DIALOGUE_PIPPET_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_PM_VISI: Wait, I was supposed to bring something?
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_: Piiipeeeeet!!! I'll use you as bait if I have to!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_DRAGON_ISLE_POST_PM_VISIT_: Well that certainly doesn't sound good!
We'd better follow them and find our own Dragon Orb. The Puppet Master's plans can't come true!
LOOT_DASH_ADD_FEATURED_CONTENT: Earn 1 loot bag by adding more Featured Content to your team.
LOOT_DASH_CHANGE_TEAM: Do you want to change your team to earn more Loot Bags?
LOOT_DASH_ADD_FEATURED_CONTENT_PLURAL: Earn {0} loot bags by adding more Featured Content to your team.
RIFTS_INVENTORY_NEED_KEYS_MESSAGE: Win battles around the world to get more!
DIALOGUE_PHYSICAL_DRAGON_DRAGON_ISLE_DEF: Wizards... you lot are nothing but trouble!
Are you gonna try to tame me with your puny spells, too?
DIALOGUE_NOOT_DRAGON_ISLE_DEFEATED_FIRST: No, of course not! Did another wizard try to do that?
DIALOGUE_PHYSICAL_DRAGON_DRAGON_ISLE_DEF: Two of them, in fact, although I sensed that the one in the purple robes and hood was much, much more dangerous.
DIALOGUE_NOOT_DRAGON_ISLE_DEFEATED_FIRST: I knew it! That's the Puppet Master!
We're after him right now! We want to stop his plan to capture you dragons.
DIALOGUE_PHYSICAL_DRAGON_DRAGON_ISLE_DEF: The Puppet Master, you say? Well, his strange little companion cast shadow magic on me! You need to be super strong to withstand it!
Say, you're pretty powerful yourself! Maybe we could train together?
Oho, I love training! And together we'll both get stronger and be ready for the Puppet Master!
Ho-ho! It sure is! Now go find some more Dragon Orbs so you can battle us again and get stronger.
I'll warn the other dragons to watch out for this Puppet Master!
DIALOGUE_PHYSICAL_DRAGON_FIRST_DRAGON_RI: Ho-ho! Eat a balanced diet and get lots of exercise for your muscles and for your mind. Then maybe one day you’ll grow up as big as me!
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_FIRST_DRAGON_RIFT: No need for that when I can just make YOUR power mine as well, dragon. Pippet, tame this beast!
DIALOGUE_PHYSICAL_DRAGON_FIRST_DRAGON_RI: Huh?! What is this? You'll never tame me by relying just on spells!
Wait a second, I remember you! You tried to kidnap my hatchlings!
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_FIRST_DRAGON_RIFT: Hmmm, I might have to come up with a different plan. I'll be back soon, and stronger. Just you wait and see!

DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_CAMPAIGN_REPLAY_I: SURPRISE EVERYONE! I've travelled from the past to celebrate my victory with myself!
Where’s all the shadow magic? …and darkness?
What? I travelled all this way only to find out... I LOST?! This is NOT the party I was looking forward to!
Ooh, I know how to fix this mess. I will use my Time Twister to go back in time and mess things up even more!
Hahaha! This time, my shadow magic will be more powerful than before, and the enemies will be much harder to stop!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_CAMPAIGN_REPLAY_INTRO_1_NO: Oh no! The Puppet Master is going to mess up the past!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_CAMPAIGN_REPLAY_INTRO_1_CH: Oh no! Your charged levels got pulled into the portal and now the Puppet Master is going to mess up the past!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_CAMPAIGN_REPLAY_INTRO_2: But look! He dropped his Time Twister! You can use it to go back in time and stop him!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_CAMPAIGN_REPLAY_INTRO_3: Luckily all your pets and gear will come with you, but you’ll need a large collection to get through the Puppet Master’s magic!
DIALOGUE_NOOT_CAMPAIGN_REPLAY_INTRO_4: Now go, quickly! I’m sure my past self will help you out when you arrive!

DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_1: You've unlocked the daily battles, good job!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_2: You've unlocked the festival wheel, good job!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_3: You've unlocked the style shop, good job!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_4: Go and defeat the Starry Knight once and for all!
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_1: Too slow, sparkle granny! All Star Shards now belong to the Puppet Master.
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_2: Ah! The legendary wizard arrives at last! I, Sir Constello, shall teach you a lesson. In the name of the Puppet Master!
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_3: HaHa! A fine duel indeed! Next time, I won't go easy on you... Farewell, CLOVRATS!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_7: Oh no, he got away. Well, at least we got some of the Star Shards back!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_8: You are stellar, Wizard! Thanks to you, we can twinkle the Festival back to life!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_9: Nice job! You’ve brought back the Starlight Shop. Come see all the sparkly goodies inside!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_10: I’m Imani Star! You can still find more Star Shards in battles and quests!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_11: Oh, and by the way! When the statue’s eyes glow, that sneaky thief is back in Lamplight Town. Go find them and battle!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_12: Now, go on and finish those quests, dear, so we can bring Starlight Fest back to life!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_13: The statue can also use its magic to call the thief for a battle anytime you want!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_14: Now, go on and finish those quests, dear, so we can keep that pesky villain away.
RIFTS_DYNAMIC_STORE_MODAL_BODY_TEXT: Visit the {0} to purchase exciting rewards!
DIALOGUE_SNIPS_1: Here for a trim? I've got ya covered!
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_4: W-well played… for a beginner! But don’t celebrate too much. I SHALL RETURN!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_15: Phew! I hope they don’t come back so soon.. Oh Dear…
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_16: Starlight Fest has gotten stronger, but it has now attracted Pets controlled by the Puppet Master. They're overrunning the town!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_17: But on the bright side, you can now have Daily Battles, with special pets all over Lamplight Town. Keep on shining, dear!
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_5: Huff..huff.. You are persistent. Don’t get too comfy! I’LL BE BACK BEFORE YOU KNOW IT!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_18: Excellent! With that, the Starlight Wheel is back in action. Spin it every day to win starry prizes!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_19: The Wheel will change its prizes a few times during the festival, so come back often! Star-TASTIC!
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_6: ARGGGGGHH! I cannot believe that I keep losing to the likes of you. You will regret this!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_20: Marvelous! You can now visit the festival stylist. Dress up in shiny, starry clothes fit for a galaxy!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_21: Sparkles and stars! You helped bring the Starlight Festival back to life! We’re almost there!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_22: Keep defeating that star thief! I’ll set a trap. Every time you weaken them, the better our chance to catch them… for good!
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_7: Oh, I see your sneaky plan! Trying to make me weaker, are ya? Ha! But you can’t snuff out these stars!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_23: Hehe. Just a few more Star Shards and we’ll be set for the big showdown. I can’t wait!
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_8: WHAT? This... can’t be!  All my beautiful... *wheeze*... designs... ruined... by a wannabe wizardling!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_24: Nice job, wizard! The stage is set. Finish those last quests, and then go teach that silly show-off a lesson!
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_9: Aaaagh! Witness my full power, you pint-sized spell-flinger! I shall crush you with the full might of the stars! EN GARDE!
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_26: Hooray! You did it, dear! Starlight Fest is safe, and that over-glittered wannabe won’t  bother us anymore.
DIALOGUE_IMANI_STAR_27: I am eternally grateful and so proud of you. Enjoy the rest of the festival!
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_STARLIGHT_1: Whaaaat?! My brilliant Starlight Knight... defeated?! My dazzling plan... ruined?! Aaargh, never mind!
DIALOGUE_PUPPET_MASTER_STARLIGHT_2: Well, just wait until everyone sees my next spooktastic scheme! They’ll be begging for mercy... Muhahahaahh!
DIALOGUE_STARRY_KNIGHT_10: No......you miserable.....it’s impossible....my cosmic might...my sparkling splendor....Aaaaaaaaahhhhh!

PLAY_NEW_QUESTS_IN_THE_STORY_TAB_TO_HELP: Play new quests in the Story tab to help Imani every week.

GO_BATTLE_SOME_PETS_TO_FIND_THEM_HERE: Go Battle some pets to find them here!

DOES_BURN_DAMAGE_FOR_2_TURNS_THIS_DAMAGE: Does burn damage for 2 turns. This damages the unit at the start of the turn.

DIALOGUE_THEO_FTUE_STATUS_EFFECT_ACADEMY: Cool, right? Keep an eye out for pets with spell effects. They can really help in tricky battles!
I'll go back to my work now to see if I can learn something new. Goodbye, Wizard!
DIALOGUE_THEO_FTUE_STATUS_EFFECT_BATTLE_: See that swirly icon on one of your spells? Click on the spell to learn what it does.
This spell has a special effect. Try using it!
Whoa! Did you see that? Click on my pet to see what's happening.
That's a Burn effect! Click the pet again and let's keep battling.
Ouch! Did you see that? My pet took damage from the burn!
That's all I wanted to show you for now. Let's go back!

POST_BATTLE_NOOT_TIP_ELEMENT_STRENGTH: Pets take less damage from the element they're strong against.

DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_0_SELENA_: Excellent! With these cards, I can call upon the power of the Moon and grant good fortune to all of Lamplight Town and the Land of Prodigy! Come!
Marvelous! The Moonlight Ceremony is now complete, thanks to you! I will hold onto these cards to make sure the fortunes come true.
You again?? Don't you ever give up?
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_0_POPPET: You thought I was defeated? I'm taking all these cards! Their Moon power will give fortune only to the Puppet Master! Hahahahahahahhahaha!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_1_POPPET: You got me, but I got you! I'm taking these cards with me to the Moon and beyond! So long, weaklings!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_1_SELENA_: Unbelievable! That is not how wishes or fortune works. You can't just take someone else's wish... Poppet really is a silly Puppet Boy.
The Moonlight Ceremony is now complete! But Poppet is still out there on the Moon with my cards. It would be good to bring those cards back...
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_2_POPPET: UGH! I can't believe you were able to follow me to the Moon. But I won't let you win so easily. Take this!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_3_POPPET_: What??! The Puppet Master's Wish Card has been damaged. This is all your fault - WHY couldn't you just let me win?
No... This cannot be! I was so clever, smart, and strong! I can't believe I lost to you. Nooooooooooooooooooooo!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_3_SELENA_: Well done! You got all the Wish Cards back. They're safe now. Too bad Poppet and the Puppet Master's cards were overly damaged...
But Pippet's card and everyone else's seem in perfect condition. I wonder what the Puppet Master's wish was about?
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_4_PUPPET_: Poppet, you useless knucklehead! And here I thought a new minion would work out better.
PIIIIIIIIIIIPPET! Where are you?! I can't find my SLIPPERS! OUCH! I just stubbed my toe... of all the misfortunes!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_4_PIPPET: Right here, MASTER! Let me get those for you right away!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_ENDING_4_PUPPET_: Oh, Pippet, you truly are the best minion. If only everyone could be as useful as you are right now.
But who needs good fortune when you have power? And power I shall have! My next scheme will be one for the ages... Haha! Mwahaha!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_1: Come back with Flora's Wish Card from the Firefly Forest.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_SUFFIX: You can also buy moontastic items using Moon Gems that you gain from battles and completing Moonlight Festival quests.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_2: Please defeat Poppet to get Flora's Wish Card back.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_3: Come back with Bok's Wish Card from Wizard Dash.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_4: Please defeat Poppet to get Bok's Wish Card back.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_5: Come back with Harriet's Wish Card from the Rifts on Dragon Isle.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_6: Please defeat Poppet to get Harriet's Wish Card back.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_7: Come buy moontastic items using Moon Gems that you gain from battles and completing Moonlight Festival quests.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_SUFFIX: Remember that Poppet and my cards are still out there...
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_SHOP_OPEN_8: Thank you for saving the festival! Come buy moontastic items using Moon Gems that you gain from battles and completing Moonlight Festival quests.
MEMBER_LOCKED_LIVE_OPS_RIFT_MODAL_MEMBER: Members can equip rewards right away!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_1: Oh, hello! Welcome to the Moonlight Festival, where wishes come true! But my Wish Cards were stolen… Can you help me?
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_2: A Puppet Boy stole my Wish Cards! I need them to complete the Moonlight Ceremony, where we grant good fortune to those who wish.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_3: This Wishing Fountain is full of wishes you can help make come true! Completing wishes fills the Wish Cards with magic. Here’s your first one!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_4: I wish Firefly Forest was more peaceful...
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_5: Thank you, Wizard! Come meet me at - Wait, someone is coming!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_6: Oh, Wishing Fountain, hear my wish. I wish for the Puppet Master to have the best minion ever.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_7: Hey! You're looking for stolen Wish Cards? Well, I'm not giving mine to you.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_8: That was not the Puppet Boy who stole my Wish Cards. I wonder why he just ran away...
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_9: Hahahaha! I can’t believe you just beat up my little brother, Pippet! The Wish Cards you’re looking for belong to the Puppet Master. Ciao, bye!!!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_10: Now THAT is the Puppet Boy who stole my Wish Cards! Quick! We must go after him!
MEMBER_LOCKED_LIVE_OPS_RIFT_MODAL_BODY_T: Everyone can play. Members get awesome rewards!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_INTRO_11: You can’t stop me, Wizard! This festival is already mine!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_STORY_2_1_POPPET: That didn’t go according to plan, but I have more tricks up my sleeve. I’ll be seeing you later!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_STORY_2_1_SELENA: Thanks to you, he dropped a Wish Card, which gives me enough power to re-activate the main attraction!
Surprise! I’ve prepared something special this festival - a Moon Gate! It can take you to the Moon!
Enter the Moon Gate to visit a special area of my kingdom on the Moon with extra festival content. It will stay open all festival long!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_STORY_2_2_SELENA: Welcome to the Moon! As a Member, you can explore, meet special pets, and even collect a special magical chest. Have fun!
Come back every day after 4:00 pm to collect more from the magical chest. See you around!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_STORY_2_3_SELENA: Oh! I still need help with the festival here in Lamplight Town! Remember that wish from the Wishing Fountain? Please, help me fill my Wish Cards with magic.
Now, go complete this wish to fill the next Wish Card with magic. Come back here when you’re done!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_1_SELENA_1: Wonderful! Good job at filling the card with Wish Magic! Wait... Not YOU again?
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_1_POPPET: Oh, yes! One more Wish Card for the Puppet Master. YOINK! That’s my card now! Bye!!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_1_SELENA_2: What?! He stole the magic-filled Wish Card! Please, battle him and get it back. He shows up in Lamplight at least once a day to cause trouble.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_1_SELENA_3: Wonderful. Thank you for bringing back this Wish Card, but I will need more Wish Magic for the Moonlight Ceremony.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_1_SELENA_4: Please go back to the Wishing Fountain to find more wishes. Complete a wish to infuse the next empty card, and come back to me.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_2_BOK: Bok wish someone would participate in a race for Bok...
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_2_SELENA_1: Excellent. Complete this quest to fill the Wish Card with magic. Come back to the Lamplight Main Square to see me when you’re done.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_2_SELENA_2: Excellent work at getting me another card.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_2_POPPET: And that’s another card for my collection. You won’t catch me this time!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_2_SELENA_3: That naughty Puppet Boy is simply infuriating! Doesn’t he know that good fortune is for everyone?! Someone needs to teach him another lesson!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_2_SELENA_4: Oh, that’s perfect. I think with just one more card, I should be able to begin the Moonlight Ceremony to wish everyone good fortune.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_3_HARRIET: I wish someone would explore the Dragon Rifts and rescue some awesome pets...
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_3_SELENA_1: Nice. Now, go and complete this quest to fill the Wish Card with magic. Come back to the Lamplight Main Square to see me when you’re done.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_3_SELENA_2: That’s the last card I think I’ll need.
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_3_POPPET: I can’t believe you guys fell for it again. You won’t defeat me this time, Wizard!
DIALOGUE_MOONLIGHT_2026_WISH_3_SELENA_3: Please get that card back. With it, I can complete the Moonlight Ceremony.
MOONLIGHT_ABOUT_1: Complete tasks before Moonlight Fest ends!
MOONLIGHT_ABOUT_3: Defeat the boss to continue Festival Story!
MOONLIGHT_GUIDANCE_START: Meet Selena by the Wishing Fountain

RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_1_LO: Have patience, young wizard. Practice, grow stronger, then return to challenge me again!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_1_ST: Well now, you must be that young wizard I keep hearing about. Let's see how strong you are!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_1_TA: Show me your brilliance, young wizard!
Prove to me you have the strength to banish the coming shadow!
No shadows may exist in my light!
If you cannot defeat me, how will you defeat the Puppet Master?
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_1_WI: Impressive, young wizard! But it will take patience and more battles before we are ready to face the coming shadow. Return soon!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_2_LO: Better, but still not good enough. Have patience and keep training. When you are ready to try again, I will be waiting for you here.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_2_ST: You've returned. Have you grown stronger than last time? Show me.
Another round, young wizard? Good. Don't give up!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_2_TA: You couldn't defeat me last time. What do you think has changed?
Show me your best! I won't go easy on you!
You have grown since we last met! But will it be enough?
You must do better than that, wizard!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_2_WI: Brilliant work, my young friend! You have indeed grown! A good first step. Return soon so we may take the next one together!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_3_LO: My brilliance remains unmatched! Good effort, my little friend. You will do better next time.
Have patience, young wizard. Growth takes time. I will await you here until you are ready to try again.
The Puppet Master is growing stronger, wizard! So we must get stronger, too! Come back soon, so we can train some more!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_3_ST: I see you've returned. Show me what you've learned since last we met.
Your strength continues to grow. Together, we will be ready for the Puppet Master's return.
You're back! Let us combine our light and together grow even brighter!
Ah, the brilliant young wizard returns. Is it time for another training session?
Well, you're certainly no flash in the pan! Come, wizard. Let us shine brightly together!
Only light can defeat darkness! We must grow stronger to match the Puppet Master!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_ASTRAL_DRAGON_PHASE_3_TA: But what will my brilliant light reveal about you, young wizard?
The Pupper Master's shadow grows darker by the day!
You certainly are bright, wizard, but I won't let you outshine me!
Patience, young wizard. We must keep training to defeat the Puppet Master!
Good! Try that again, wizard. Practice makes perfect!
Will you be bright enough to banish the Puppet Master's shadow?
We must keep practicing. When the Puppet Master returns, we need to be ready!
We must grow stronger to match the Puppet Master!
Hard work and practice - these are the only ways to improve! Let us do both!

RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_1_LOSE: Ha! Burned to a crisp! A flawless victory!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_1_STAR: A new challenger! Let's see if your soul burns brightly enough to amuse me!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_1_TAUN: Feel the searing heat of my domain, wizard. This world is my personal forge.
You are nothing but kindling for my fire.
Your weak magic is an insult to my perfect flame.
How dare you trespass in my sacred, burning expanse!
Yes! A true fight! Show me your inner fire!
Finally, a worthy spark of power!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_1_WIN_: Impossible! My fire cannot be defeated!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_2_LOSE: You fought with spirit, but my fire always prevails!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_2_STAR: So, the little ember returns to the inferno.
You again? Have you come to be extinguished?
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_2_TAUN: Your movements are still clumsy and predictable.
My flames will purify your amateurish spells.
Was your last searing defeat not enough humiliation?
You try my patience with this foolishness.
I see you've improved! But your fire is still weak.
Let our battle be a roaring, world-shattering inferno!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_2_WIN_: You survived my furnace again?! Your luck is impressive.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_3_LOSE: You are not ready to face his darkness. Not yet.
My victory today means nothing for the war.
And so, with your failure, the Puppet Master wins.
This is precisely why he underestimates my power!
You have fire, but it's not yet a star.
This victory tastes of ash and your failure.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_3_STAR: Let us begin our familiar, fiery dance once more.
The Burning Expanse itself roars for me.
This Puppet Master... his shadow insults my domain.
His foul corruption taints my sacred pyre!
You are no longer my primary amusement.
Fine. We have a common foe. Do not disappoint me.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_3_TAUN: You are stronger, I grant you that.
You will serve your purpose against my enemy.
Your fire must burn brighter! As I command it.
With my might, we could incinerate his darkness!
But your form is flawed. Your fire is unfocused.
The Puppet Master would laugh at your flame.
Is this the fire you will face him with?
Your power is a candle to his dark furnace!
We are wasting my time with this spectacle!
Do you not see the threat to my world, fool?!
He tried to capture me, to make a trophy of my magnificent flame!
Show me you're a worthy tool against him!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_3_WIN_: Impressive. But he is far stronger than you.
You have won this battle, but not the war.
Losing to you is better than the shame of his touch.
This small defeat means nothing against him.
You did what he could not! You withstood my inferno!
Perhaps your spark can be forged into a real weapon.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_4_LOSE: You have learned a valuable lesson from me.
The lesson is over. Reflect on my teachings.
Not good enough. We ignite the forge again.
You are still too weak. You must train harder.
Do not let this defeat quench your spirit!
Rise from the ashes! My work is not finished!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_4_STAR: My training begins now. Do not fail me.
Let this fiery battle forge your senses.
Again! Your focus is embers, not a real flame!
Do not disappoint me now, wizard.
Show me you are ready to wield true blaze!
Let's see if my lessons have paid off.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_4_TAUN: Anticipate my every move. Read the flames.
Let your rage become a focused firestorm!
Unleash the inferno I know is in your heart!
We will be a storm of my fire and your rage!
Your defense is pathetic. Forge it in this fire.
Do not hesitate. Strike with searing purpose.
Discipline is the forge for real power, like mine.
Pathetic! He will extinguish you with a thought!
That weak spell will get us both killed!
Is this truly the best you can burn?!
Again! Until your knuckles bleed cinders!
Yes! That is the searing fury I demand!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_4_WIN_: Adequate. Your inner fire finally shows some heat.
The student's flame begins to resemble my own.
Do not grow arrogant with this small victory.
This is but one step to reaching my level.
Haha! Yes! This is the fire I have created!
You are finally becoming a searing threat to him!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_5_LOSE: My work with you is finally complete.
It seems I still have a few tricks to burn.
Do not be discouraged. You are ready.
This proves only that you are not me.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_5_STAR: This is our final, fiery trial. Everything is on the line.
One last blaze before you face the final war as my champion.
All my teachings, all my effort, it all comes down to this inferno.
Do not fail me. Do not let the fire of my world die.
Let our flames become a single beacon of my might!
Let's give that monster a preview of his fiery doom!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_5_TAUN: You no longer fight as my student. You fight as my equal.
Your power can now burn brighter than the sun!
You are ready! Go and set the world ablaze!
Our dance of fire is a thing of terrifying, perfect beauty.
Every flaming strike you make is precise now.
I have taught you everything a mortal can learn.
Remember the world you fight to protect! Let it be your fuel!
Let your sorrow become your strength!
Do not forget the price of our failure!
Channel your anger into pure, molten energy!
Show me the burning soul I have forged, wizard!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_FIRE_DRAGON_PHASE_5_WIN_: My teachings have made you a master of the flame.
The world is in your hands now. Its fate is forged in your fire.
I am proud of the magnificent, fiery weapon you have become.
May your inner fire burn eternal, a testament to my power.
You have bested me! Your blaze is magnificent!
Now go! Show that coward my ultimate creation!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_PHYSICAL_DRAGON_PHASE_1_: Great effort, wizard, but it's time to hit the gym!
Ho-ho, another wizard! Let's see if your magic can match my muscle!
I didn't let the last wizard beat me! I won't let you either!
You wizards are all the same, relying on spells!
Your spells are weak compared to my raw power!
You're stronger than you look, wizard! But I still won't let you tame me!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_PHYSICAL_DRAGON_PHASE_2_: Oh, don't be discouraged, wizard! The Puppet Master underestimated me, too!
You put up a good fight, wizard, but the Puppet Master couldn't defeat me either!
Let me ask you something. Are you any better than this Puppet Master?
I faced the Puppet Master and came out unscathed! Now it's your turn!
Who is this Puppet Master that dares enter the Plane of Whispers?
I hope you've been training, wizard! You'll need it!
Are you ready for another intense workout, wizard?
The Puppet Master was strong, but I'm stronger!
You think you can outdo the Puppet Master? Prove it!
You beat me, and the Puppet Master couldn’t! Incredible!
You’ve shown true strength, wizard! Keep pushing your limits!
Your training is paying off, wizard!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_PHYSICAL_DRAGON_PHASE_3_: Focus on building your strength so you're ready for the Puppet Master.
The Puppet Master is our real challenge, wizard! Let’s prepare!
The Puppet Master will fall, but we need to be ready, wizard!

RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_1_LO: Most run away before I can talk.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_1_ST: Why does everyone always run away from me?
I'm not like the other dragons, you know.
Maybe we can still be friends after this.
Don't be scared of the dark. It's not so bad.
A new friend... or a new enemy?
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_1_TA: You're not afraid of a little shadow, are you?
I won't go easy on you just because you're new.
Come on, show me what you've got!
I promise I won't bite. Well, I'll try not to.
The darkness isn't your enemy. I am!
I hope you don't give up too easily.
I need a friend, not another scaredy-cat.
Why do you look so scared? It's just me.
Let's see if you can handle my shadows.
I just want to understand why you're here.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_1_WI: Maybe you're not like the others.
I guess I can trust you after all.
I'm glad you didn't run away.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_2_LO: I thought you were better than this.
I'll be here when you're ready.
Looks like you need to get a bit stronger.
Don't worry, you'll do better next time!
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_2_ST: Don't be afraid to try new things.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_2_TA: This will be fun if you can keep up.
Are you ready to face your fears?
Do you know why the other dragons are scared of me?
You think you can win this time?
Try to keep up with me!
This probably won't end well for you.
I'm glad you want to play, unlike the other dragons.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_3_LO: The other dragons didn't want to play either...
Maybe I won't play so rough next time.
Awww, I'm tired of being the only one left.
Awww, don't run away like the others!
Penumbra is my home, not yours.
I'm not like the other dragons.
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_3_ST: I'll help you get ready for the Puppet Master.
The Puppet Master wanted to play, too!
I never met another shadow creature before, but that's what the Puppet Master is!
The Puppet Master ran away like the others...
You're my first real friend! Let's play!
The Puppet Master hasn't come back to play yet, but you have!
Let's train and show the Puppet Master our strength.
Are you ready for another challenge?
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_3_TA: You won't beat me this time.
Promise you'll do this again sometime!
I can beat both you and the Puppet Master!
I bet you're wondering what I'll do next.
Did you know the Puppet Master's shadow magic doesn't work on me?
I just want to understand the world...
Ooooh, which one of us is going to win this time?
The Puppet Master tried to catch me. Are you trying to do that too?
RIFTS_BOSS_BARK_SHADOW_DRAGON_PHASE_3_WI: You are different from the rest!
I guess I still have much to learn.
I'll keep fighting you to get better.
Do you want to be the master of Penumbra?
Come back anytime for another round!
Woah, when did you learn all that?
You won this one, but I still liked playing against you.
Wow, you're ready to take on the Puppet Master!
