BOOTS_1_FLAVORTEXT: It is said that a Magi once ran to the sun with these shoes on. You're not sure if you could, but they sure are fast.
BOOTS_2_FLAVORTEXT: Many people don't trust Warlocks, so they don't get out much. These keep their feet cozy at home.
BOOTS_3_FLAVORTEXT: These will certainly make a bold statement at your next wizarding get together.
BOOTS_4_FLAVORTEXT: Extremely warm, these will keep your feet toasty in the mountains, but elsewhere they might make them sweaty.
BOOTS_5_FLAVORTEXT: Are these dragonskin boots? Comfortable, but they smell a bit like burnt meat and old cave.
BOOTS_6_FLAVORTEXT: Fitted with a handy self-drying flame, you can swim with these on and not have to worry.
BOOTS_7_FLAVORTEXT: Nothing special, but they'll protect your feet during training.
BOOTS_8_FLAVORTEXT: Lightweight and breathable they'll make your feet move faster and maybe a little less smelly.
BOOTS_9_FLAVORTEXT: Made from cloth, don't get them wet or your feet will be cold all day!
BOOTS_10_FLAVORTEXT: Whoa, these are heavy! Your feet feel pretty safe, but it also feels like you're walking through mud.
BOOTS_11_FLAVORTEXT: The choice of the everyday wizard. They say they're hand-crafted in the Spire.
BOOTS_13_FLAVORTEXT: You don't usually go for used boots, but the Magi made these long-lasting and really cool-looking.
BOOTS_14_FLAVORTEXT: You can wear these boots all year long, just make sure to change your wizard socks!
BOOTS_15_FLAVORTEXT: Metal boots? You might not move that quickly, but your toes are totally protected!
BOOTS_16_FLAVORTEXT: When you wear them you move more gracefully but also always have the urge to dance.
BOOTS_17_FLAVORTEXT: Although Culix was a bit stuffy he had great taste in shoes.
BOOTS_18_FLAVORTEXT: Worn by a former master of trials, whose feet seemed to be quite small. They're a little snug.
BOOTS_19_FLAVORTEXT: Fuzzy on the inside and waterproof on the outside, the perfect choice for the long winter months.
BOOTS_20_FLAVORTEXT: Your friend wore these spiky boots to play wizard soccer once, they don't let him play anymore. I wonder why?
BOOTS_21_FLAVORTEXT: These sure do live up to their name.
BOOTS_22_FLAVORTEXT: You do feel suddenly more magical, but sometimes people laugh at the pointy toes.
BOOTS_23_FLAVORTEXT: Made for battle in the cold, these shoes help you stay on top of the snow instead of sinking in.
BOOTS_24_FLAVORTEXT: The trademark boots of the Firefly Forest. It says they're made with moss and lots of love.
BOOTS_25_FLAVORTEXT: A wizard once wanted to see how high he could jump with these shoes on. He's supposed to come back down any day now.
BOOTS_26_FLAVORTEXT: Official boots of the Annual Wizard Dueling Contest, they say "The Choice of Champions" in big letters on their sides.
BOOTS_27_FLAVORTEXT: Commonly worn by the tribes of the Shiverchill Mountains, many travellers take them when going to cold places.
BOOTS_28_FLAVORTEXT: Made for wizards whose feet get cold. It feels like your toes are warming up in front of the fire.
BOOTS_29_FLAVORTEXT: Said to be suitable for dueling on rocky terrain.
BOOTS_30_FLAVORTEXT: These boots cut through water, allowing wearers to walk as easily as if they were on land.
BOOTS_31_FLAVORTEXT: These bubbly boots make you feel like you could float through the air.
BOOTS_32_FLAVORTEXT: These boots have been through many adventures on the high seas, but they're still sturdy!
BOOTS_33_FLAVORTEXT: These boots are so tough, they make your toes smell like the ocean!
BOOTS_34_FLAVORTEXT: Keep your toes warm with these lava rockin' boots inspired by Magmischief himself.
BOOTS_35_FLAVORTEXT: These skates are so much better than sneakers when you are out on the ice. So sit down, lace up, and go skate!
BOOTS_36_FLAVORTEXT: Walk in these elfin shoes and it feels like you are walking barefoot through a field of fragrant flowers.
BOOTS_37_FLAVORTEXT: These heavy boots keep your toes warm in even the coldest of places!
BOOTS_38_FLAVORTEXT: These boots will allow you to walk on the moon, just don't expect to move too fast.
BOOTS_40_FLAVORTEXT: As one of the latest innovations in Skywatch technology, the Gyro Leg Extend-O's have gathered a lot of attention from other towns for their outstanding performance.
BOOTS_41_FLAVORTEXT: Fly around the world in these boots and become the ultimate explorer!
BOOTS_42_FLAVORTEXT: The ultimate protection for a seasoned wizard. With bronze from knee to toe, you're all covered.
BOOTS_43_FLAVORTEXT: Finely crafted footwear for those that hunt Elemental Titans.
BOOTS_44_FLAVORTEXT: These ninja covers will make you move like the wind.
BOOTS_45_FLAVORTEXT: To be a Beastmaster, one must walk in the footsteps of a beast.
BOOTS_46_FLAVORTEXT: Forged using the strongest and lightest of metals.
BOOTS_47_FLAVORTEXT: Traveling great distances puts a toll on anyone's feet. These leather shoes are said to last a very, very long time.
BOOTS_48_FLAVORTEXT: Flexible boots that allow the wearer to make quick and sudden movements.
BOOTS_49_FLAVORTEXT: Sturdy, shiny, and very mysterious. Everything you need to be considered a Black Knight.
BOOTS_50_FLAVORTEXT: Watertight and sure footed to ensure perfect balance with every throw.
BOOTS_51_FLAVORTEXT: These fancy dress shoes contain loss-lace comm links to Spy HQ.
BOOTS_52_FLAVORTEXT: Hi-tech shoes of the future. Of course they light up!
BOOTS_53_FLAVORTEXT: Show off your skills as a true Archivist with these Archivist boots!
BOOTS_54_FLAVORTEXT: These boots were worn by those few wizards who mastered the rare Astral magic.
BOOTS_55_FLAVORTEXT: Match that hat and uniform with the perfect pair of Academy-issued shoes.
BOOTS_57_FLAVORTEXT: These boots are worn by those who have learned to ride winged beasts of any size!
BOOTS_58_FLAVORTEXT: You won't have to worry about stubbing your toes with these crystal-toed boots.
BOOTS_59_FLAVORTEXT: No wizard will want to step on your toes while you're wearing these spikes.
BOOTS_61_FLAVORTEXT: These shoes have been said to grant the user the ability to be as light as a leaf!
BOOTS_69_FLAVORTEXT: Forged using a secret technique making them impervious to dents and scratches.
BOOTS_79_FLAVORTEXT: Soft and silent, perfect for a rogue looking to avoid attention.
BOOTS_80_FLAVORTEXT: Stay grounded in slippery situations with these spiked climbing shoes.
BOOTS_81_FLAVORTEXT: These boots leave creature-like prints in the snow.
BOOTS_82_FLAVORTEXT: These keep a miner's feet dry when stumbling across underground rivers and waterfalls.
BOOTS_83_FLAVORTEXT: These are some heavy-duty explorer boots. They even have pockets!
BOOTS_84_FLAVORTEXT: Light as a cloud, these clawed boots are designed to scale Elemental Titans during combat.
BOOTS_85_FLAVORTEXT: These boots allow the wearer to leap higher during Elemental Titan battles.
BOOTS_86_FLAVORTEXT: Clawed boots made from Plant Titan Shards that let you to move quickly through trecherous terrain.
BOOTS_87_FLAVORTEXT: Clawed boots made from Fire Titan Shards to help navigate ignious zones with ease.
BOOTS_88_FLAVORTEXT: Clawed boots from Water Titan Shards that let you swim quickly through any watery environment.
BOOTS_89_FLAVORTEXT: Light despite looking heavy, Storm Titan Shards make them crackle with thunder every step you take.
BOOTS_90_FLAVORTEXT: Fur lined boots built using Ice Titan Shards keep the wearer's feet from slippling in even the iciest of areas.
BOOTS_91_FLAVORTEXT: Strangely, you can feel the ground with your feet when you wear these shoes. They help you grow closer to nature.
BOOTS_92_FLAVORTEXT: Look how your rainbow laces light up in your Groovy Boots!
BOOTS_93_FLAVORTEXT: The gem in the Celestial Boots brings good luck when they're worn with the rest of the celestial armour.
BOOTS_94_FLAVORTEXT: Advanced boots with information flowing through them.
BOOTS_102_FLAVORTEXT: With these solar power science boots every step is a step in the right direction
BOOTS_105_FLAVORTEXT: These boots will really quack you up.
BOOTS_107_FLAVORTEXT: Ward off angry monsters AND stay incredibly warm. Perfect for long treks in Shiverchill Mountains.
BOOTS_108_FLAVORTEXT: These webbed feet make it easier to swim in water and balance on lily pads.
BOOTS_111_FLAVORTEXT: The boots once worn by a famous trio known for their expert sword skills. The Three Mustardteers.
BOOTS_112_FLAVORTEXT: Milk cartons and paper plates held together with duct tape. How crafty!
BOOTS_113_FLAVORTEXT: The softness of the cake makes these shoes incredibly comfy to walk around in.
BOOTS_115_FLAVORTEXT: Spring loaded, and steam powered. These boots make you run faster and jump higher.
BOOTS_116_FLAVORTEXT: A pair of space boots that are still lightly covered in moon dust.
BOOTS_117_FLAVORTEXT: There are magnets on these boots so that the wearer can walk on metal things in space without floating away.
BOOTS_118_FLAVORTEXT: These boots have jets on them in order to move around in zero gravity.
BOOTS_119_FLAVORTEXT: The squishy slime makes these boots very comfy to walk around in. Try not to lose your socks when taking them off.
BOOTS_120_FLAVORTEXT: This is prime slime for the gloop troop! Slime flies when you're having fun, and anyone who crosses you is cruising for an oozing.
BOOTS_121_FLAVORTEXT: Walk with stealth as you step with these furry feet! These slippers are for the cuddly and curious cat loving wizards out there!
BOOTS_122_FLAVORTEXT: A beetle warrior never backs down. Their clawed feet help them grip the ground and push back when wrestling other beetles.
BOOTS_123_FLAVORTEXT: Tough but lightweight leather boots. Perfect for chasing down villains.
BOOTS_124_FLAVORTEXT: With this prehistoric footwear, you could even outrun a T-Rex.
BOOTS_125_FLAVORTEXT: The Puppet Master was once a student of the Academy, but was kicked out for causing too much trouble.
BOOTS_129_FLAVORTEXT: These boots still haven't found their true master.
BOOTS_130_FLAVORTEXT: These boots have a stiff sole that helps you walk long distances without getting tired.
BOOTS_131_FLAVORTEXT: The hard bottoms of these boots is ideal for running fast across open ground!
BOOTS_132_FLAVORTEXT: Infused with astral energy these boots give new meaning to being light on your feet!
BOOTS_133_FLAVORTEXT: Made of overlapping plates of golden armor, these are remarkably flexible!
BOOTS_134_FLAVORTEXT: These boots are ideal for when you want to cut things with your hands and your feet at the same time!
BOOTS_136_FLAVORTEXT: The soft soles of these boots make them almost silent even when you run!
BOOTS_139_FLAVORTEXT: Adorable slippers that are also filled with the magical speed of a Mystyyk.
BOOTS_140_FLAVORTEXT: These magical spats also belonged to the mischievious gnome allowing him to move at incredible speeds, even letting him run on rainbows.
BOOTS_141_FLAVORTEXT: Boots fashioned by embuing golden alloy with sun rays.
BOOTS_142_FLAVORTEXT: These boots soak up water making them almost completely water proof.
BOOTS_143_FLAVORTEXT: The ice crystals that adorn it jingle as you walk.
BOOTS_144_FLAVORTEXT: Made from special Spicefire Jelly that molds itself to the wearer's feet.
BOOTS_145_FLAVORTEXT: These boots have pointy toes which are very popular among seafarers.
BOOTS_146_FLAVORTEXT: Legends say that these boots make you move faster, but it's never been confirmed.
BOOTS_147_FLAVORTEXT: To achieve the special color, magic ingredients from the shadow lands is used.
BOOTS_148_FLAVORTEXT: Fly across the ice with these special skates.
BOOTS_149_FLAVORTEXT: Water jet boots used by Merlings to move quickly in the ocean depths.
BOOTS_150_FLAVORTEXT: Extremely comfy shoes that mold to your feet.
BOOTS_151_FLAVORTEXT: Soft furry boots that are made of recycled bamboo fibers.
BOOTS_152_FLAVORTEXT: Made from waffle cones of the highest quality, triple baked for durability.
BOOTS_153_FLAVORTEXT: The scales used to make these boots let the wearer walk on lava with ease.
BOOTS_154_FLAVORTEXT: Boots to keep your feet safe in the hottest of infernos.
BOOTS_155_FLAVORTEXT: Thick boots made of rubber and leather to stomp around in.
BOOTS_156_FLAVORTEXT: Foot wrappings with gems and gold for shuffling around pyramids.
BOOTS_157_FLAVORTEXT: Pointy toed shoes that make you whistle while you walk.
BOOTS_158_FLAVORTEXT: Fancy shoes resembling those worn by the Pumpkin Lord.
BOOTS_159_FLAVORTEXT: Boots to keep Snowman feet icy cold so that they don't melt.
BOOTS_160_FLAVORTEXT: Basic footwear of those working the fields of gold.
BOOTS_161_FLAVORTEXT: Leather boots of the highest quality for the fairy lords and ladies.
BOOTS_162_FLAVORTEXT: Mystical boots filled with Summerfest magic which belonged to the wizard who started festivals.
BOOTS_163_FLAVORTEXT: Soft paws that don't sink in deep snow and keep your toes toasty.
BOOTS_165_FLAVORTEXT: The official boots worn by helpers at Winter Fest!
BOOTS_166_FLAVORTEXT: Boots with a unique reflective lining to keep your feet nice and warm.
BOOTS_168_FLAVORTEXT: Elite Spats that keep your feet impeccably clean.
BOOTS_170_FLAVORTEXT: The soles of these boots are extra padded so they make almost no noise.
BOOTS_171_FLAVORTEXT: Makes your feet smell like a bed of roses.
BOOTS_172_FLAVORTEXT: Soft and warm yet powerful for leaping and running.
BOOTS_173_FLAVORTEXT: The red pompoms jangle to the rhythm as the dancer stomps.
BOOTS_174_FLAVORTEXT: Very comfortable for entertainers that do most of their work standing.
BOOTS_175_FLAVORTEXT: The leather is very soft and can be worn for hours even during acrobatic stunts.
BOOTS_176_FLAVORTEXT: Frosted Steel binds these ancient boots.
BOOTS_177_FLAVORTEXT: The magical ice crystals ensure good grip.
BOOTS_178_FLAVORTEXT: Pointed shoes for those with spiky personalities.
BUNDLE_1_FLAVORTEXT: A bundle of one conjure cube.
BUNDLE_2_FLAVORTEXT: A bundle of five conjure cubes.
BUNDLE_3_FLAVORTEXT: A bundle of twenty conjure cubes.
CURRENCY_1_FLAVORTEXT: The gold standard for shopping. Earn these from quests, battles, and more!
CURRENCY_2_FLAVORTEXT: The primary currency of Pumpkinfest. Used to buy costumes and cool items in the town square during the event!
CURRENCY_3_FLAVORTEXT: A rusty old coin. Used to buy rare artifacts from the wandering merchant.
CURRENCY_4_FLAVORTEXT: The primary currency of the Starlight Festival. These are used to buy costumes and cool items in the town square during the event!
CURRENCY_5_FLAVORTEXT: The primary currency of Winter Fest. These are used to buy costumes and cool items in the town square during the event!
CURRENCY_9_FLAVORTEXT: This special wood was used by Floatlings to construct makeshift houses as they traveled around the island in search of knowledge.
CURRENCY_10_FLAVORTEXT: These captured Dragon Flies can be traded to Mama Star for special dragon-ish items.
CURRENCY_11_FLAVORTEXT: Shards broken off of a Titan created by the Order of Influence. Can be given to a Floatling to have the Shadow magic removed from it, in exchange for rare items.
CURRENCY_12_FLAVORTEXT: Adventure in Bonfire Spire to earn these lava chips, then spend them at the Region Shop.
CURRENCY_13_FLAVORTEXT: Adventure in Firefly Forest to earn these woodland coins, then spend them at the Region Shop.
CURRENCY_14_FLAVORTEXT: Adventure in Shipwreck Shores to earn these pirate coins, then spend them at the Region Shop.
CURRENCY_15_FLAVORTEXT: Adventure in Shiverchill Mountains to earn these icy coins, then spend them at the Region Shop.
CURRENCY_16_FLAVORTEXT: Adventure in Skywatch to earn these mechanical coins, then spend them at the Region Shop.
CURRENCY_17_FLAVORTEXT: These magical eggs are only found when the Springfest is active. They can be collected by adventuring or performing Springfest activities. Spend them at the Fox or Bunny shops.
CURRENCY_18_FLAVORTEXT: The primary currency of the Academy Archives. Five of these are collected per Archive run to summon a prize!
CURRENCY_19_FLAVORTEXT: Adventure through the Academy's Archives to collect these pages, then exchange them at the Academy Shop.
CURRENCY_20_FLAVORTEXT: The primary currency of Summerfest. These are used to buy cool items, hair styles, and hair colors in the town square during the event!
CURRENCY_21_FLAVORTEXT: Samples are bits of elemental magic collected from places. They're studied, then used to build things using the same elements!
CURRENCY_22_FLAVORTEXT: Samples are bits of elemental magic collected from places. They're studied, then used to build things using the same elements!
CURRENCY_23_FLAVORTEXT: Samples are bits of elemental magic collected from places. They're studied, then used to build things using the same elements!
CURRENCY_24_FLAVORTEXT: Samples are bits of elemental magic collected from places. They're studied, then used to build things using the same elements!
CURRENCY_25_FLAVORTEXT: Samples are bits of elemental magic collected from places. They're studied, then used to build things using the same elements!
CURRENCY_27_FLAVORTEXT: Magicoin is a special currency. Use them to evolve your pets, capture new ones, and participate in special activities.
CURRENCY_28_FLAVORTEXT: A dragon scale from a mighty dragon. Collect these by completing Rifts and use them to buy cool items in the Rift Shop!
CURRENCY_29_FLAVORTEXT: A dragon scale that shines bright but seems it won’t shine for very long. Get it by completing the time-limited Rifts and trade it for cool items in the Rift Shop.
CURRENCY_30_FLAVORTEXT: A dragon scale that shines bright but seems it won’t shine for very long. Get it by completing the time-limited Rifts and trade it for cool items in the Rift Shop.
CURRENCY_31_FLAVORTEXT: The primary currency of Moonlight Fest. These are used to buy cool items, hair styles, and hair colors in the town square during the event!
DORM_1_FLAVORTEXT: Just a regular old chair. You can sit on it; that's all you need, right?
DORM_2_FLAVORTEXT: A sturdy steel chair. One questions the comfort of such a thing.
DORM_3_FLAVORTEXT: Cleverly made from driftwood and old rope.
DORM_4_FLAVORTEXT: A sturdy steel table. Much more practical than its chair counterpart.
DORM_5_FLAVORTEXT: A standard glass table. Don't jump on it!
DORM_6_FLAVORTEXT: This little pink flower is a common gift on Valentine's Day.
DORM_7_FLAVORTEXT: A regular green potted plant. Gives off a distinct aroma.
DORM_8_FLAVORTEXT: This plant has grown to be a bit unkempt. Perfect for those who want a wild look for their room.
DORM_9_FLAVORTEXT: This large wildflower can only be found during spring in the Firefly Forest. Its perfume-like odor keeps bugs away.
DORM_10_FLAVORTEXT: Like a regular couch, but purple.
DORM_11_FLAVORTEXT: Like a regular couch, but green.
DORM_12_FLAVORTEXT: This large, lazy chair is so comfy, that once you sit on it, you'll never want to stand up again.
DORM_13_FLAVORTEXT: A regular wooden bookshelf, perfect for storing all of your favorite spell books.
DORM_14_FLAVORTEXT: A standard wooden table. The most standard of all the tables.
DORM_15_FLAVORTEXT: Tiny chairs made for tiny individuals.
DORM_16_FLAVORTEXT: This large wooden wardrobe has all the space you could need to store your wizarding outfits.
DORM_17_FLAVORTEXT: This sky themed bed is so fluffy, it's like lying on a cloud.
DORM_18_FLAVORTEXT: A square window, or is it 4 square windows?
DORM_19_FLAVORTEXT: The fanciest of windows. Not actually, but it is pretty fancy.
DORM_20_FLAVORTEXT: This spacious table is perfect for large gatherings and parties.
DORM_21_FLAVORTEXT: A stout sea chest to safely store all your treasures.
DORM_22_FLAVORTEXT: This cuddly guy is perfect for those lonely days at home.

DORM_27_FLAVORTEXT: This throne doesn't look too comfy, but gosh does it look cool.

DORM_32_FLAVORTEXT: A normal table lamp. You can put it on a chair if you're feeling crazy.

DORM_36_FLAVORTEXT: A banner flown only by those who have mastered the art of fire spells.
DORM_37_FLAVORTEXT: A banner flown only by those who have mastered the art of ice spells.
DORM_38_FLAVORTEXT: A banner flown only by those who have mastered the art of earth spells.
DORM_39_FLAVORTEXT: A plush dragon toy. It is surprisingly not particularly hug-able, as the skin is made from real dragon hide.
DORM_40_FLAVORTEXT: Keep your toosh warm with the ultimate in heated seats. A flaming throne!

DORM_45_FLAVORTEXT: A throne carved from a stump. It is still a living plant, so be sure to water it!
DORM_46_FLAVORTEXT: A lamp designed to look like a Phoenix.
DORM_47_FLAVORTEXT: A lamp designed to look like a Phoenix, but icy for some reason.
DORM_48_FLAVORTEXT: This piece of amber has an ancient bug pet preserved inside of it. It makes for quite the conversation piece.
DORM_49_FLAVORTEXT: The perfect chair for a seafarer or, ironically, someone who cannot swim.
DORM_50_FLAVORTEXT: This tiny bed is convenient to have for guests. It can compress for easy storage.
DORM_51_FLAVORTEXT: No party is complete with some great music to dance to. Get your groove on!
DORM_52_FLAVORTEXT: A perfect scale model of a ship. One wonders how they got it into the bottle.
DORM_53_FLAVORTEXT: This carnivorous plant is useful for keeping bug infestations under control.
DORM_54_FLAVORTEXT: For those who like to reminisce about the cave-man days. Enjoy the worst night of sleep in your life.
DORM_55_FLAVORTEXT: A large decorative dyno skull. It is made from foam, for ease of transportation.
DORM_56_FLAVORTEXT: This bed is filled with helium, making it float slightly off the ground. Its light rocking will put you to sleep instantly!
DORM_57_FLAVORTEXT: This cute little stuffed Dyno used to be a common prize at the Dyno dig site.
DORM_58_FLAVORTEXT: A boombox for the old school. Perfect if you like your music to sound old.
DORM_59_FLAVORTEXT: The steering wheel from a sunken ship. The remnants of the ship have never been found.
DORM_60_FLAVORTEXT: A lamp designed for those with interests in sci-fi.
DORM_61_FLAVORTEXT: A perfect addition to any home in a location that is prone to flooding, or if you just can't swim.
DORM_62_FLAVORTEXT: This table comes equipped with everything you could need to investigate a dig site.
DORM_63_FLAVORTEXT: Intended for peering out at the sea. One wonders about its purpose in a house.
DORM_64_FLAVORTEXT: A chair carved from ancient bones. It is surprisingly sturdy for something so old.

DORM_66_FLAVORTEXT: A cuckoo clock, without the cuckoo. It sends the alarm directly to its owner's brain, telepathically.
DORM_67_FLAVORTEXT: It is miraculous that one can even sit on this throne, as the seat is made of clouds.
DORM_68_FLAVORTEXT: Honestly, it's just a clock. Or is it? Hmmm...
DORM_69_FLAVORTEXT: A rainbow that doesn't need any rain! Use it to spice up your living space.
DORM_70_FLAVORTEXT: This mysterious machine is constantly whirring and whizzing with no obvious effect.
DORM_71_FLAVORTEXT: A lamp shaped like a lightning bolt, powered by Storm magic.
DORM_72_FLAVORTEXT: Pleasant dreams are had by all who sleep on this bed.
DORM_73_FLAVORTEXT: A great way to make your home feel extra comfy on cool autumn nights!
DORM_74_FLAVORTEXT: They say this chair is from a very old house filled with spooks!
DORM_75_FLAVORTEXT: The table of choice for those who like hosting Pumpkinfest activities in their own home.
DORM_76_FLAVORTEXT: Pianoy the piano was made to look like it could come to life any minute!
DORM_77_FLAVORTEXT: They say these cubed pumpkins come from a far off land in the east!
DORM_78_FLAVORTEXT: A plump chair in the shape of a pumpkin.
DORM_79_FLAVORTEXT: A traditional table displayed to commemorate the annual Pumpkinfest event.
DORM_80_FLAVORTEXT: A bed for the bravest of wizards!
DORM_81_FLAVORTEXT: If you want to add a touch of spookiness to your home to celebrate Pumpkinfest, this side table will do the job.
DORM_82_FLAVORTEXT: The white pattern on this table was inspired by a spider's web.

DORM_84_FLAVORTEXT: If you're a fan of sweet treats, this decoration is for you!
DORM_85_FLAVORTEXT: While you're counting down the days to the next Starlight Festival, this cute Milky Way the Space Cow plush can keep you company.
DORM_86_FLAVORTEXT: A great way to add a bit of Starlight Festival flair to any room.

DORM_88_FLAVORTEXT: Adds a splash of star to any room.

DORM_90_FLAVORTEXT: A cute little night light. Great for any room.
DORM_91_FLAVORTEXT: A great lamp to light up your nights at home!
DORM_92_FLAVORTEXT: A traditional lantern used in the old days of the Starlight Festival.

DORM_94_FLAVORTEXT: A casual seating option for Starlight Festival fans.
DORM_96_FLAVORTEXT: This isn't made of cheese, so don't try to eat it.
DORM_97_FLAVORTEXT: Want to have guests over to celebrate the Starlight Festival? This table's for you!

DORM_105_FLAVORTEXT: A very classy decoration for your home during the Winterfest celebration.

DORM_108_FLAVORTEXT: This red fireplace will be sure to keep you warm through all the cold Winterfest months!

DORM_110_FLAVORTEXT: The perfect addition to a Winterfest-themed living room!
DORM_111_FLAVORTEXT: A warm and cozy rug that feels great to walk on in your bare feet - even in the middle of winter!

DORM_113_FLAVORTEXT: The absolute perfect couch to curl up on during those cold Winterfest nights.
DORM_114_FLAVORTEXT: If you're pining for a new dining room set, this chair's just for you! If you get a set of four of these, they will really spruce up your dining room!

DORM_130_FLAVORTEXT: After a long day of battling, cozy up in this chair and take it easy!
DORM_131_FLAVORTEXT: The tools are just for show, but they could show off someone with a real talent for gardening!
DORM_132_FLAVORTEXT: These lamps add a really fun vibe to any room!

DORM_149_FLAVORTEXT: Utilizing the cleansed Titan Shard as a source for light, this was a traditional way for Titan Conquerors to light their fortresses, in the past. This is an animated house item!
DORM_150_FLAVORTEXT: To represent the hard-fought battle of the Wizards against the Titan. This is an animated house item!

DORM_152_FLAVORTEXT: Show your Fox pride while keeping your shield and sword handy.

DORM_161_FLAVORTEXT: You can bounce around all day and never get tired.

DORM_167_FLAVORTEXT: This floatling doll will just make you squeal with how cute it is!
DORM_168_FLAVORTEXT: Represent Academy pride by hanging an Academy banner in your own home!

DORM_170_FLAVORTEXT: Books on books on books on books!

DORM_172_FLAVORTEXT: Perform on-stage with your friends in your own home!
DORM_173_FLAVORTEXT: Feel just as grand as Florian himself in this sturdy wooden chair.

DORM_175_FLAVORTEXT: This little plane will fly you away to dreamland as you fall asleep.

DORM_179_FLAVORTEXT: A comfy striped towel that's perfect for catching some sun or having a picnic. Obtained during Summerfest.
DORM_180_FLAVORTEXT: This animatronic bear used to be found in Lamplight's Arcade, but now that it doesn't work, it's just a decoration.

DORM_182_FLAVORTEXT: Look at these fish swiming happily in your brand new aquarium!
DORM_183_FLAVORTEXT: This big, cuddly rabbit has a fresh, spring scent to it.
DORM_184_FLAVORTEXT: This jellyfish doesn't have a heart, a brain, or eyes. What a strange creature!
DORM_185_FLAVORTEXT: No one quite knows what this plant is, but it's mysteriously beautiful.
DORM_186_FLAVORTEXT: A staple for any wizard's home.
DORM_187_FLAVORTEXT: Marvel at the pretty winter wonderland from inside your warm home.
DORM_188_FLAVORTEXT: Enjoy the chilly splendor of Shiverchill's icey trees in your very own house.
DORM_189_FLAVORTEXT: You may not be able to ride around in it, but it sure is fun to sit in!
DORM_191_FLAVORTEXT: Now you can enjoy your favourite arcade game from home!
DORM_192_FLAVORTEXT: This golden bathtub is enchanted with a magic that leaves you sparkling after a bath!
DORM_193_FLAVORTEXT: Make yourself comfy on a life-size beanbag replica of the island's largest pet.
DORM_194_FLAVORTEXT: Sit back, relax, and become the ultimate gamer.
DORM_196_FLAVORTEXT: Celebrate the sentimental time of Winterfest by decorating your house with these dazzling snowflake lights.
DORM_197_FLAVORTEXT: An extremely old painting of The Ancient that was created long ago to honor their existence.
DORM_198_FLAVORTEXT: Rewarded to those who completed The Ancient's 6th Trial. You can sense The Ancient's power within this statue.
DORM_199_FLAVORTEXT: Who knew that a big leafy bush could be so comfy! The softest bushes can be found on Harmony Island.
DORM_202_FLAVORTEXT: Do you want to heat up your food in a flash! This magic microwave can do just that.
DORM_203_FLAVORTEXT: Tickle the piano keys with the new magic rainbow Keyboard.
DORM_204_FLAVORTEXT: This cool magical digital fridge has just what you need to keep your food nice and chill.
DORM_205_FLAVORTEXT: Strike the right cords to get the coolest sound from your rainbow guitar.

DORM_208_FLAVORTEXT: The Arc of Light Bronze trophy is not easy to get. Even smart wizards struggle to receive this award.
DORM_209_FLAVORTEXT: The Arc of Light Silver trophy is not easy to get. Genius level wizards struggle to obtain this prize
DORM_210_FLAVORTEXT: The Arc of Light Gold trophy is not easy to get. Prodigy level wizards study really hard to obtain this prize
DORM_212_FLAVORTEXT: Stay cool during the summer months under this fashionable Beach Umbrella. Sold during Summerfest.
DORM_213_FLAVORTEXT: Now you can have the lovely smell of campfire right in your house! Wow! Sold during Summerfest.
DORM_214_FLAVORTEXT: It really ties the room together.
DORM_215_FLAVORTEXT: One of the golden pages from the academy archives.
DORM_216_FLAVORTEXT: Do not, under any circumstances, put your tongue on the armrest.
DORM_218_FLAVORTEXT: Who's going to clean this up?
DORM_219_FLAVORTEXT: Time to throw a pizza party!
DORM_220_FLAVORTEXT: The soft, squishy rice makes for a very comfortable seat.
DORM_221_FLAVORTEXT: This charming rug is made to look just like a slice of watermelon.
DORM_222_FLAVORTEXT: The soft bread mattress is extremely comfy. No one is going to mind crumbs in this bed.

DORM_224_FLAVORTEXT: The Food Fight Silver trophy is not easy to get. Genius level wizards struggle to obtain this prize.

DORM_229_FLAVORTEXT: When you leave your home this Clean Bot will make sure there's not a dust bunny in sight.
DORM_230_FLAVORTEXT: Have fun in the sand with your very own Sand Castle!
DORM_231_FLAVORTEXT: It's a bit too warm for this snowman. Better grab a mop.

DORM_234_FLAVORTEXT: A full sized model rocket ship. Ready for take off!
DORM_235_FLAVORTEXT: A spinning model of the solar system.
DORM_236_FLAVORTEXT: A weird looking plant. You get the feeling you shouldn't get too close to it.
DORM_237_FLAVORTEXT: This view from outer space is unbeatable. Whatever you do, just don't break the glass!

DORM_239_FLAVORTEXT: The Enter the Cosmos Silver trophy is not easy to get. Genius level wizards struggle to obtain this prize.

FOLLOW_13_FLAVORTEXT: During the night, this owl is alert and on the prowl. In the day, however, it's super sleepy. Can be bought at the Pet Shop in Lamplight Town.
FOLLOW_14_FLAVORTEXT: This parrot can mimic your voice, but it only really uses certain words...Polly want a cracker? Can be bought at the Pet Shop in Lamplight Town.
FOLLOW_15_FLAVORTEXT: A very smart bird, cockatiels are known to be able to count and even use math! Can be bought at the Pet Shop in Lamplight Town.

FOLLOW_18_FLAVORTEXT: This parrot can mimic your voice, but it only really uses certain words...Polly want a cracker? Can be bought at the Pet Shop in Lamplight Town.
FOLLOW_19_FLAVORTEXT: This little lizard can change its colors to blend in with its surroundings, but sometimes just chooses not to. Can be bought at the Pet Shop in Lamplight Town.
FOLLOW_20_FLAVORTEXT: A gecko can climb almost any surface and even upside down! This gecko seems to be afraid of heights, though. Can be bought at the Pet Shop in Lamplight Town.
FOLLOW_21_FLAVORTEXT: A gecko can climb almost any surface and even upside down! This gecko seems to be afraid of heights, though. Can be bought at the Pet Shop in Lamplight Town.
FOLLOW_22_FLAVORTEXT: Turtles are normally pretty slow, but this one has no issue keeping up with you! Can be bought at the Pet Shop in Lamplight Town.
FOLLOW_23_FLAVORTEXT: These happy little creatures couldn't possibly be more excited to join you on your quest! They are well known for being great pals on adventures. Sold during Winter Fest.
FOLLOW_24_FLAVORTEXT: What's black and white and chilly all over? Why a penguin of course! This polar pal is ready to explore beyond the cold lands it calls home with you! Sold during Winter Fest.
FOLLOW_25_FLAVORTEXT: With just a little bit of magic, this snowman came to life, and now, he's looking for a buddy to explore with! Don't worry, he can't melt! Sold during Winter Fest.
FOLLOW_26_FLAVORTEXT: This furry friend loves to frolic in the snow and play hide and seek in the caverns deep within Shiverchill Mountains.
FOLLOW_27_FLAVORTEXT: Shiverchill is home to many interesting creatures. The rare Purple Owl is one of them! Some say that these owls have magical powers.
FOLLOW_28_FLAVORTEXT: Steam-powered robot birds were created to help workers in Skywatch repair the weather machines.
FOLLOW_29_FLAVORTEXT: Some turtles that live in Firefly Forest fall asleep in soil for long periods of time. When this happens, flowers begin to grow on their shell!
FOLLOW_30_FLAVORTEXT: The rainbow panda is so hard to find in the forest, because it can blend in so well with its environment.
FOLLOW_31_FLAVORTEXT: These sheep like to get around by riding on gusts of wind that sweep them up. If you ever see a group of them gathered together, watch out! Their fur can rub together and create lightning storms!
FOLLOW_32_FLAVORTEXT: This cactus is surprisingly cuddly! The needles on it fall off at a very young age, leaving its soft skin free to cuddle!
FOLLOW_33_FLAVORTEXT: These little fiery friends scamper, scurry, and swim through the lava of Bonfire Spire. Because of this, very few people have ever seen one!
FOLLOW_34_FLAVORTEXT: A sly fox would usually keep its distance, but this one is happy to follow you anywhere! Reward for linking your account with your parent's account.
FOLLOW_35_FLAVORTEXT: A sparkly, pocket-sized friend who loves to stuff lots of food in its cheeks!
FOLLOW_36_FLAVORTEXT: A sparkly kitty whose glittering fur will be the talk of the town!
FOLLOW_37_FLAVORTEXT: This sparkly best friend is loyal to the end and is happy to follow you anywhere!
FOLLOW_125_FLAVORTEXT: He comes from an unknown place with an unknown name. You've decided to call him Big Hex for the large bolts that seem to hold him together.
FOLLOW_126_FLAVORTEXT: Florafox can speak with nearby plants and trees by planting itself in the soil. The bulb on Florafox's tail produces a pollen that can heal any plant, no matter how injured or withered.
FOLLOW_127_FLAVORTEXT: The air around Arctursus is always cold. This is because the tips of his fur are made from an ice that can never melt, and so no matter where he goes he is always at a comfortable temperature.
FOLLOW_128_FLAVORTEXT: Diveodile's natural magic ability is boosted by the Warden pendant it wears, allowing it to cast strong water spells to generate water, or even control the water around itself!
FOLLOW_129_FLAVORTEXT: While traveling underground, Magmischief can sense movement on the surface, so he knows exactly where to appear and get the biggest scare out of those who have entered Bonfire Spire.
FOLLOW_130_FLAVORTEXT: What a cute little crab! He blows bubbles too! Pinch pinch pop!
FOLLOW_131_FLAVORTEXT: What's more adorable than a baby squid that squirts ink? Not much!
FOLLOW_132_FLAVORTEXT: This floaty fish is fun to have bob along behind you.
FOLLOW_133_FLAVORTEXT: It's a cat AND a fish! What's not to love?!
FOLLOW_134_FLAVORTEXT: Chill & Char are best friends, not just because they share a body, but because their abilities complement each other so well.
FOLLOW_135_FLAVORTEXT: Tidus can create massive waves with a flap of his powerful wings below water. Tidus has also been known to do it just to ride the waves.
FOLLOW_136_FLAVORTEXT: On sunny days, Luma loves to romp through flower-filled fields, soaking up the sun rays.
FOLLOW_137_FLAVORTEXT: Eclipse soars and swoops through the clouds in the night sky, playing hide-and-go-seek with the moon and stars.
FOLLOW_138_FLAVORTEXT: These speedy little fellows can be pretty sneaky. Watch out, they may even try to hide your things!
FOLLOW_139_FLAVORTEXT: Woah! What's that funky smell? It wasn't me.
FOLLOW_140_FLAVORTEXT: These guys love to play in lava and pop the lava bubbles.
FOLLOW_141_FLAVORTEXT: Who needs a campfire when you have your own Pyro Peck to keep you warm and cozy!
FOLLOW_142_FLAVORTEXT: Even robots can have hearts. Love your Robota Monsta and this little monster will love you back!
FOLLOW_143_FLAVORTEXT: Cloudstriders were once used as Skywatch's sky watch, patrolling between the clouds. Now you can adopt one as your own. You will feel safer right away.
FOLLOW_144_FLAVORTEXT: Supachill Monstas are super chill and super fun to be around! They can't wait to go on new and exciting adventures.
FOLLOW_145_FLAVORTEXT: The Snow Ermine loves to play hide-and-seek. They are often found hiding in the crates and snow piles in cold environments.
FOLLOW_146_FLAVORTEXT: Peak Pecks will absolutely love you as long as you feed them icicles every once in a while.
FOLLOW_147_FLAVORTEXT: Bring the spirit of the Fox with you everywhere with this brave battle buddy.
FOLLOW_148_FLAVORTEXT: The Bunny Bandit Buddy is your constant companion, always hopping a few steps behind you.
FOLLOW_149_FLAVORTEXT: This playful little dinosaur will happily follow you everywhere, bobbing its tiny little arms and big head.
FOLLOW_150_FLAVORTEXT: It turns out that piggies really can fly!
FOLLOW_151_FLAVORTEXT: This mysterious looking wolf offers protection and love for its owner.
FOLLOW_152_FLAVORTEXT: This friendly bird loves being around water. Puffins can splash around all day!
FOLLOW_153_FLAVORTEXT: He always has your back, and never leaves old batteries on the sidewalk.
FOLLOW_154_FLAVORTEXT: This Drone has so much energy! Who knew they could make such fun buddies?
FOLLOW_155_FLAVORTEXT: Often found around books in the Archives, these little glow-worms love to read anything they can inch their way to!
FOLLOW_156_FLAVORTEXT: Why carry your spell book when you can have it follow you?
FOLLOW_157_FLAVORTEXT: The traditional wizard sidekick, complete the look of your Academy uniform with the official Academy pet.
FOLLOW_158_FLAVORTEXT: No matter where you go, this kitty will follow you with a glow!
FOLLOW_161_FLAVORTEXT: What's so scary about a floating marshmallow?
FOLLOW_162_FLAVORTEXT: There is no other creature that enjoys eating crystals as much as the crystal muncher.
FOLLOW_163_FLAVORTEXT: It may be a baby but it sure can pack a powerful headbutt!
FOLLOW_164_FLAVORTEXT: Robo-Pup is just like a normal puppy, except with super-speedy rocket paws.
FOLLOW_165_FLAVORTEXT: This lil guy slithers around from place to place and smells things with his tiny little tongue.
FOLLOW_166_FLAVORTEXT: Hopping her way around - she sure loves to meet other pets.
FOLLOW_167_FLAVORTEXT: Mr. Turtle wasn't going to take being called slow anymore - an upgrade to wheels now has him zipping across the island!
FOLLOW_168_FLAVORTEXT: An alien buddy following you around and ready to zap at the next wizard who would attack you.
FOLLOW_169_FLAVORTEXT: This cuddly little bear shines just as brightly as the stars in the sky!
FOLLOW_171_FLAVORTEXT: This lil' pup is made of snow and will happily follow you wherever you go!
FOLLOW_172_FLAVORTEXT: This unique rat is quick-witted, resourceful, charming and adaptable and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_173_FLAVORTEXT: This little sloth drifts along on a little cloud so it can sleep all day long.
FOLLOW_174_FLAVORTEXT: This little pup is always in a festive mood.
FOLLOW_175_FLAVORTEXT: Though Nessie prefers the water, it'll happily swim in the air and follow you for treats.
FOLLOW_176_FLAVORTEXT: These odd-looking fluffs have often been spotted slinking around Shiverchill Mountains. What's Snup with that?
FOLLOW_177_FLAVORTEXT: What's a Snup? Not much, what's Snup with you?
FOLLOW_179_FLAVORTEXT: Fun Flamingo Fact: A flock of flamingos is called a flamboyance!
FOLLOW_181_FLAVORTEXT: Bats like to live on Harmony Island in large groups, but this one seems to want to go on adventures with you.
FOLLOW_182_FLAVORTEXT: This little spider likes to spend its free time browsing the web.
FOLLOW_183_FLAVORTEXT: It's a bit strange for a gourd to be flying, but this squash sure seems pumped about it.
FOLLOW_184_FLAVORTEXT: The 'bell' is the flap of skin beneath each moose's throat, though it doesn't chime.
FOLLOW_185_FLAVORTEXT: Despite being called 'Snowy', this little buddy seems to be made of ice rather than snow.
FOLLOW_186_FLAVORTEXT: This unique ox is strong, determined, honest and patient and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_187_FLAVORTEXT: You'll feel like you're hopping through adventures with Benny Bunny by your side!
FOLLOW_188_FLAVORTEXT: Don't try to wear this croc on your foot!
FOLLOW_189_FLAVORTEXT: Fennec foxes' large ears aren't just good for hearing, but they also help to get rid of too much body heat on hot days.
FOLLOW_190_FLAVORTEXT: This Snowy Kangaroo loves adventure so you better hop to it or you might get left behind.
FOLLOW_191_FLAVORTEXT: This is a unique type of rabbit that can only be found on Harmony Island.
FOLLOW_192_FLAVORTEXT: What a mysterious animal. It looks like a mix between a tiger, a dog, and a kangaroo! You can find them on Harmony Island.
FOLLOW_193_FLAVORTEXT: Don't let let his stubby legs fool you, this hedgehog gains great speed when it rolls with you.
FOLLOW_194_FLAVORTEXT: This Penguin knows how to have fun! It will slip and slide on its stomach beside you, leaving a cool trail of snowflakes behind.
FOLLOW_195_FLAVORTEXT: These kittens are inseparable and are not really fond of strangers. If they don't run away that means they really like you.
FOLLOW_196_FLAVORTEXT: This buddy loves to try to blend into its environment. If you're able to see when it changes colours this means the chameleon really trusts you.
FOLLOW_197_FLAVORTEXT: This buddy loves to fly in the air. Legend says it sprinkles magic particles on its friends for good luck and fortune.
FOLLOW_198_FLAVORTEXT: This cool lion takes pride in being around cool people. So if it stays by your side you must be cool too.
FOLLOW_202_FLAVORTEXT: Two heads are better than one!
FOLLOW_203_FLAVORTEXT: Your friends will flipper when they see this cute Dolphin!
FOLLOW_204_FLAVORTEXT: A cute, fuzzy Bumblebee to call your own!
FOLLOW_205_FLAVORTEXT: This sly creature can be found exploring the Ice Tower.
FOLLOW_206_FLAVORTEXT: These worms like to read and eat old books. This one prefers the taste of non-fiction.
FOLLOW_207_FLAVORTEXT: These worms are really a kind of slime, but they eat so much sugar that their bodies become candy over time.
FOLLOW_208_FLAVORTEXT: So cute! Looks like you could just take a bite... but don't.
FOLLOW_209_FLAVORTEXT: Scooplings wear a pointy cone on their head to keep hungry animals away... But that cone looks pretty tasty too. Someone better say something.
FOLLOW_210_FLAVORTEXT: An enchanted burger. It seems very attached to you and will follow you wherever you go.
FOLLOW_212_FLAVORTEXT: This little puppy may have trouble seeing where it's going, it's a good thing it has you to lead the way.
FOLLOW_213_FLAVORTEXT: Awe look at its paws, it looks like they are wearing cute little mittens! That must be how they got their name.
FOLLOW_214_FLAVORTEXT: Make no mistake, all the stripes this buddy has have been earned through loyalty and cuddles. Have you earned your stripes?
FOLLOW_215_FLAVORTEXT: If you are ever chilly, Blaze will be right there to bring the heat!
FOLLOW_216_FLAVORTEXT: This creepy crawly is often found in the caves of Shiverchill Mountain. It collects crystals to wear on it's back as protection.
FOLLOW_217_FLAVORTEXT: While traveling underground, Magmayhem can sense movement on the surface, so he knows exactly where to appear and get the biggest scare out of those who have entered Bonfire Spire.
FOLLOW_219_FLAVORTEXT: The feathers on the top of its head raise or lower based on their mood.
FOLLOW_221_FLAVORTEXT: This ladybug loves the leaves that grow in Firefly Forest. Take it on walks there to brighten its day.
FOLLOW_223_FLAVORTEXT: A colourful striped fish that lives in the tropical waters near the coral reef.
FOLLOW_224_FLAVORTEXT: Stormy is a storm cloud that loves to shoot out lightning bolts. Try your best not to get hit by one.
FOLLOW_225_FLAVORTEXT: This cute and cuddly polar bear likes to play games but don't let that fool you, take your eye off it and it might get into trouble.
FOLLOW_226_FLAVORTEXT: Anything that falls on the floor belongs to her, especially food. Try to take it and you may get a scratch!
FOLLOW_227_FLAVORTEXT: This adorable little fluff buddy may be called a panda, but is actually closer to a raccoon. They live up in the mountains and climb trees all day.
FOLLOW_228_FLAVORTEXT: Slimy is a young slime who wants to become a powerful wizard like you one day. Show them how it's done!
FOLLOW_229_FLAVORTEXT: This little panda has an appetite for adventure and snacks. It will never leave your side and if you're lucky it might even share some of its delicious bamboo with you.
FOLLOW_230_FLAVORTEXT: The air around Arcturion is always cold. This is because the tips of his fur are made from an ice that can never melt, and so no matter where he goes he is always at a comfortable temperature.
FOLLOW_231_FLAVORTEXT: Trusty companion of Howard Cornelius, the mountain-climbing Yeti.
FOLLOW_233_FLAVORTEXT: Shiver & Scorch are best friends, not just because they share a body, but because their abilities complement each other so well.
FOLLOW_235_FLAVORTEXT: This pup looks like none you've ever seen before, it's out of this world!
FOLLOW_236_FLAVORTEXT: This little chimp is training to go into space some day.
FOLLOW_237_FLAVORTEXT: This AI helper has many apps and features and can answer any question you ask it.
FOLLOW_238_FLAVORTEXT: It's unclear if this is a toy, or if there is a tiny pilot inside flying the thing.
FOLLOW_239_FLAVORTEXT: This unique tiger is brave, confident, passionate and resilient and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_240_FLAVORTEXT: Some advice from a friendly racoon: masks are fun, climbing is great exercise, don't eat junk food, people throw away strange things, and the night is more fun than the day.
FOLLOW_241_FLAVORTEXT: Aquadile's natural magic ability is boosted by the Warden pendant it wears, allowing it to cast strong water spells to generate water, or even control the water around itself!
FOLLOW_243_FLAVORTEXT: Froggy likes to jump and splash all day. Try not to get too wet when playing with this buddy.
FOLLOW_244_FLAVORTEXT: Watch as it gently floats behind you. But I've always wondered... how do they steer these things?
FOLLOW_245_FLAVORTEXT: This adorable rescue pup brings warmth and joy wherever they go, with a barrel of delicious hot apple cider around their neck!
FOLLOW_246_FLAVORTEXT: Pirates will sometimes have parrots as buddies, but this parrot IS a pirate.
FOLLOW_247_FLAVORTEXT: Nebula soars and swoops through the clouds in the night sky, playing hide-and-go-seek with the moon and stars.
FOLLOW_248_FLAVORTEXT: They may look innocent, but Canadian geese can be very aggressive. Good thing this one is on your side.
FOLLOW_249_FLAVORTEXT: These little shades love to scare people and can often be found hiding in shadows waiting to jump out at people passing by.
FOLLOW_250_FLAVORTEXT: Painting eggs is a fun Springfest activity. However, they aren't normally meant to hatch.
FOLLOW_251_FLAVORTEXT: Blast Star can create almost any type of machinery from raw scraps, and can even power them using his own energy. Thanks to his creation, Blast Star can use magic to harness storm power and create powerful spells.
FOLLOW_252_FLAVORTEXT: On sunny days, Lumanight loves to romp through flower-filled fields, soaking up the sun rays.
FOLLOW_253_FLAVORTEXT: Deep in the sea, Riptide can flap its powerful wings to create massive waves. Sometimes riding them to shore, but only if no one is looking.
FOLLOW_254_FLAVORTEXT: Always hiding out in caves and fascinated with rocks, Drenchor is hard to find but can be lured with gold. Its fire magic is unique and hypnotizes everyone it sees.
FOLLOW_255_FLAVORTEXT: Their voice may not be as pretty as other birds, but crows are very smart and make for great helpers.
FOLLOW_256_FLAVORTEXT: The tag says, "I hope you enjoy your new buddy". Odd... It doesn't say who it's from.
FOLLOW_257_FLAVORTEXT: Vegabloom keeps the forest alive by spreading flowers from its tail everywhere it goes. It also drops seeds from its favourite fruits so that it can come back and get more! The magic in its paws heals the forest path as it prances around.
FOLLOW_258_FLAVORTEXT: Gryphroom is a rare sight, often sleeping in a pile of mushrooms deep in the forests. It shies away from the sun and loves the shade. It also wears a skull to avoid getting tanned.
FOLLOW_259_FLAVORTEXT: Solar can be heard from far away with the jingling sounds of its bells. Often seen flying high above the clouds trying to reach the sun, leaving a white trail across the sky.
FOLLOW_260_FLAVORTEXT: This Mythical Epic loves to be the center of attention and will spend a great deal of time grooming itself to be as beautiful as possible.
FOLLOW_261_FLAVORTEXT: This unique rabbit is gentle, artistic, compassionate, elegant and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_262_FLAVORTEXT: Barkbarian has been in many battles, but he will only look to fight the strongest of monsters in order to test his skills.
FOLLOW_263_FLAVORTEXT: Pyrodile is a thrill seeker and is always on the lookout for erupting volcanos in order to surf the waves of lava that come spilling out!
FOLLOW_264_FLAVORTEXT: Buzzra flies around on wings made of pure electricity and likes to keep itself charged up by licking storm clouds high in the sky and storing the energy in its thick fur.
FOLLOW_265_FLAVORTEXT: Splash & Spark make a good team, and use their abilities to perform powerful combination attacks.
FOLLOW_266_FLAVORTEXT: Hydroid is a robot that takes care of the ocean and all its creatures. It has powerful propellers to swim around quickly underwater during its clean up and rescue adventures.
FOLLOW_267_FLAVORTEXT: Using the power of moonlight, Luna is able to see things that might happen in the future, and uses this to help others in the present time.
FOLLOW_268_FLAVORTEXT: Enchanted to write poems about your adventures and heroic acts.
FOLLOW_269_FLAVORTEXT: Polartide stays hidden during the warmer months, only to emerge once temperatures reach the point of freezing.
FOLLOW_270_FLAVORTEXT: Blazeblooms love to come out at night especially when it's foggy to dance amongst the trees of their forest homes.  Their mystical flames glow brighter and spin around them creating a mesmerizing site for those lucky enough to witness it.
FOLLOW_271_FLAVORTEXT: Gryphtopus hides in the deepest part of the ocean, where light cannot reach. It uses its tentacles to get a sense of its surroundings.
FOLLOW_272_FLAVORTEXT: It may not be super speedy, but its bright colors make it a popular pet among Merlings.
FOLLOW_273_FLAVORTEXT: This fun bundle of emotions loves to show how it's feeling.
FOLLOW_274_FLAVORTEXT: The wheels on this bus go round and round, all through Lamplight Town.
FOLLOW_275_FLAVORTEXT: The glow of this lantern twinkles like a star, carrying your wishes with it into the sky.
FOLLOW_277_FLAVORTEXT: Frozzra only emerges from its coccoon once it gets cold enough for the hard shell to freeze. Only then will it spread its icy wings and take flight. Frozzra likes to dive into fluffy piles of snow from up above.
FOLLOW_278_FLAVORTEXT: Shimmerstorm loves nothing more than to fly into bad weather in hopes of finding lightning, which it uses to recharge its energy.
FOLLOW_279_FLAVORTEXT: Merahawk has features from many different animals at once that all come together to create one super beast!
FOLLOW_280_FLAVORTEXT: Bud the Turkey is so cute, you could just gobble, gobble, gobble it up!
FOLLOW_282_FLAVORTEXT: During a full moon this rat grows thick fur and hungers for cheese!
FOLLOW_283_FLAVORTEXT: Mothbud's fuzzy antenna can sense when danger is near, which makes them both lucky and adorable.
FOLLOW_284_FLAVORTEXT: Ice Tooth uses its long fangs to carve intricate patterns into the ice.
FOLLOW_285_FLAVORTEXT: This unique dragon is intelligent, charismatic, ambitious and innovative and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_286_FLAVORTEXT: This shooting star is just too cool for outer space!
FOLLOW_287_FLAVORTEXT: Finally a fish for dog-lovers! Half dog, half fish, or is it the other way around?
FOLLOW_288_FLAVORTEXT: The Lucky Goldpot might lose a few coins with each hop, but it magically remains full of shiny gold coins.
FOLLOW_289_FLAVORTEXT: This living banana peel is a trickster, so watch your step or it might try to make you slip!
FOLLOW_290_FLAVORTEXT: Little T-Cup is not afraid of anything, but let's hope all that hopping around doesn't lead to a chip or two.
FOLLOW_291_FLAVORTEXT: Llavama's warm fur is used to make cozy sweaters that always keep you warm. Llavama's are friendly, but can use eruptions from the volcano on their back to protect themselves.
FOLLOW_292_FLAVORTEXT: This buddy has recently retired from the circus, and is ready to go on a new adventure with you!
FOLLOW_293_FLAVORTEXT: The warm summer nights are filled with these little glowing bugs, and now you can have one to follow you around.
FOLLOW_294_FLAVORTEXT: This cute amphibian prefers to stay in the water, but will happily follow you across the lands of Prodigy.
FOLLOW_295_FLAVORTEXT: Choo choo! Have this little traditional steam engine follow you around.
FOLLOW_296_FLAVORTEXT: A bouncy cracked egg that refuses to fully hatch.  Beady eyes peek out from inside.
FOLLOW_297_FLAVORTEXT: Though they lack arms they're very strong, and love nothing more than carrying about the heaviest rocks they can find in their talons.
FOLLOW_298_FLAVORTEXT: A friendly creature, the Astral Dragonling is happy to follow you around, and collect wing rubs and treats from other wizards.
FOLLOW_299_FLAVORTEXT: Shy and timid by nature, the Shadow Chickatrice is slow to make friends, but bonds deeply when they do.
FOLLOW_300_FLAVORTEXT: Extremely rare, even in the Shadow realm. They are very friendly despite the dark world they inhabit.
FOLLOW_301_FLAVORTEXT: Fire Dragonlings are very hot and oven mitts are suggested for petting and picking up.
FOLLOW_302_FLAVORTEXT: If ice-cream or cold drinks are your thing, look no further, Ice Dragonlings are for you.
FOLLOW_303_FLAVORTEXT: Plant Dragonlings commune with nature and can make any plant grow instantly.
FOLLOW_304_FLAVORTEXT: Very emotional by nature, Storm Dragonlings always swing to the extremes.
FOLLOW_305_FLAVORTEXT: Very handy to put out fires, water plants or to wash the mud off your boots.
FOLLOW_306_FLAVORTEXT: A golden buddy for those with team spirit.
FOLLOW_307_FLAVORTEXT: A silver buddy for those with team spirit.
FOLLOW_308_FLAVORTEXT: A bronze buddy for those with team spirit.
FOLLOW_309_FLAVORTEXT: When Intitalk spreads its wings it uses the power of the sun to shine its brilliance upon the world.
FOLLOW_310_FLAVORTEXT: Someone tried to cook this egg but it got away and now it's on the run.
FOLLOW_311_FLAVORTEXT: Attention span zero, cuteness, you betcha!
FOLLOW_312_FLAVORTEXT: If clowning around was a sport this guy would be a superstar.
FOLLOW_313_FLAVORTEXT: Nothing to see here... just a salmon.
FOLLOW_314_FLAVORTEXT: Adorable and armored to the teeth, watch out for the clubbed tail, yikes!
FOLLOW_315_FLAVORTEXT: Cerenox are most active during lunar eclipses where they race each other in the shimmering twilight.
FOLLOW_316_FLAVORTEXT: The most excellent buddy to light candles, warm up toast or singe the backside of unwanted visitors.
FOLLOW_317_FLAVORTEXT: I hear that there might be whole pods of these star whales out there somewhere in the galaxy.
FOLLOW_318_FLAVORTEXT: The starry stallion is a favorite constellation buddy of many a horse aficionado.
FOLLOW_319_FLAVORTEXT: Bouncy and full of energy, this buddy will be the life of any party.
FOLLOW_320_FLAVORTEXT: Candy Cane buddies are hard to find because they are usually eaten by unknowing hungry wizards.
FOLLOW_321_FLAVORTEXT: A super cybernetic puppy with tons of gadges and doodads.
FOLLOW_322_FLAVORTEXT: A galloping, trotting horse that neighs on occasion.
FOLLOW_323_FLAVORTEXT: What could possibly be inside this wooden chest, what a mystery.
FOLLOW_324_FLAVORTEXT: Always ready to protect and serve, it can also make a mean iced-tea.
FOLLOW_325_FLAVORTEXT: This fluffy little snow cloud can drizzle wet snow all day long.
FOLLOW_326_FLAVORTEXT: Often used as spies by wizards, Shadow Dragonlings are able to dart in and out of the shadows.
FOLLOW_327_FLAVORTEXT: Extremely strong, Physical Dragonlings can carry or bat massive boulders out of the way with ease.
FOLLOW_328_FLAVORTEXT: Serasoars dive in and out of storm clouds as they bathe in the lightning to keep their feathers magnificent and gleaming.
FOLLOW_336_FLAVORTEXT: This unique monkey is witty, lively, clever, curious and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_337_FLAVORTEXT: This unique horse is active, independent, adventurous, friendly and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_338_FLAVORTEXT: This unique pig is sincere, generous, diligent, optimistic and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_339_FLAVORTEXT: This unique dog is loyal, honest, responsible, courageous and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_340_FLAVORTEXT: This unique rooster is observant, hardworking, courageous, shrewd and brings good luck.
FOLLOW_341_FLAVORTEXT: This unique snake is wise, intuitive, mysterious and charming, brings good luck.
FOLLOW_342_FLAVORTEXT: This unique ram is calm, kind, creative and empathetic, brings good luck.
FOSSIL_1_FLAVORTEXT: This bone looks like a piece from a much larger skeleton. I better find them all!
FOSSIL_2_FLAVORTEXT: This bone looks like a piece from a much larger skeleton. I better find them all!
FOSSIL_3_FLAVORTEXT: This bone looks like a piece from a much larger skeleton. I better find them all!
FOSSIL_4_FLAVORTEXT: This bone looks like a piece from a much larger skeleton. I better find them all!
FOSSIL_5_FLAVORTEXT: It appears to be a large beetle, preserved in a piece of amber. Neat!
FOSSIL_6_FLAVORTEXT: Trellobytes once scavenged the ocean floors, looking for scraps and collectible cards.
FOSSIL_7_FLAVORTEXT: A large claw to some carnivore...or perhaps an ill-tempered herbivore.
FOSSIL_8_FLAVORTEXT: This dragonfly must have landed on a tree, and got caught in some tree sap.
FOSSIL_9_FLAVORTEXT: This shell was likely once home to a large crustacean, or perhaps just a fancy-looking thermos.
FOSSIL_10_FLAVORTEXT: These are often treasured as jewelry, and some old men like to place them atop their canes.
FOSSIL_11_FLAVORTEXT: A fragment of a fossilized fish...it looks like there are more out there!
FOSSIL_12_FLAVORTEXT: A fragment of a fossilized plant...it looks like there are more out there!
FOSSIL_13_FLAVORTEXT: A skeleton of the awesome terrosaur, the meanest dyno in history!
FOSSIL_14_FLAVORTEXT: A skeleton of a Stampeed. It looks pretty cool, and boy is it heavy!
FOSSIL_15_FLAVORTEXT: This skeleton of a claustro is actually a combination of bone and cartilage.
FOSSIL_16_FLAVORTEXT: This pterrocks skeleton is incredibly fragile, and is held together with strong glue and wire.
FOSSIL_17_FLAVORTEXT: It appears to be a large beetle, preserved in a piece of amber. Neat!

FOSSIL_23_FLAVORTEXT: This fish was likely a deep ocean dweller; perhaps a Darkfish, Crazyfish, or maybe the rare Stinkyfish.
FOSSIL_24_FLAVORTEXT: A small fern, fossilized over millions of years. This plant still exists on the island today.

HAT_1_FLAVORTEXT: Think yourself a comedian? Try on this hat, and you'll be throwing punchlines left and right.
HAT_2_FLAVORTEXT: Worn to keep cool in the desert, its magic properties make it popular amongst students.
HAT_3_FLAVORTEXT: This circlet is adorned with magical jewels, making it very powerful...and expensive.
HAT_4_FLAVORTEXT: This hat happens to have its own personality, so make sure you wash your hair regularly!
HAT_5_FLAVORTEXT: Question me this, question me that...how good will you look, wearing this hat?
HAT_6_FLAVORTEXT: An ancient ruler passed this crown down to his children, and now it's in your hands.
HAT_7_FLAVORTEXT: The Hound's Helm only looks like a dog...in fact, it was actually made by dogs!
HAT_8_FLAVORTEXT: This Helm was found in the ruins of an ancient city, but mysteriously disappeared...
HAT_9_FLAVORTEXT: Mayhem was a warlock that caused lots of trouble. He was so well known that he used to wear this hat to hide among the crowds.
HAT_10_FLAVORTEXT: This crown belonged to the terrible Ice King but he gave it away when a witch turned him into a nice king.
HAT_11_FLAVORTEXT: The feathers tickle a little bit but this hat sure seems to spook your opponents. Maybe it's because it's still alive!
HAT_12_FLAVORTEXT: Keeps your head out of the sun and your hair dry during those tough training days.
HAT_13_FLAVORTEXT: It fits so nicely, and doesn't give you a case of nasty wizarding hat hair.
HAT_14_FLAVORTEXT: It's cloth. It's green. It's a green, cloth hat!
HAT_15_FLAVORTEXT: Someone told you that this was a Platypus that was turned into a hat. You're not sure, but it does seem water-resistant.
HAT_16_FLAVORTEXT: Leather hats are all the rage these days, especially since Worly the Wonderful wears one.
HAT_17_FLAVORTEXT: In classic wizarding blue, you might think this hat old-fashioned, but the old wizards smile when you wear it.
HAT_18_FLAVORTEXT: The Magi loved the sun most of all, they just didn't like it burning their heads. So they made this popular hat.
HAT_19_FLAVORTEXT: Made with Pyrium thread in a classic style. This hat is a good option just about everywhere!
HAT_20_FLAVORTEXT: Some think that the mithril in this hat gives you psychic powers, but who knows? Maybe you, when you're wearing it.
HAT_21_FLAVORTEXT: Older wizards don't like how younger ones wear this hat backwards.
HAT_22_FLAVORTEXT: Worn by fans of Culix, the famous historian who wrote "101 wacky warlock wands" and "The Tales of Hapless Headless Heath".
HAT_23_FLAVORTEXT: This ceremonial circlet is exceedingly rare and grants wisdom to those who wear it. Who would give it up?
HAT_24_FLAVORTEXT: The official hat worn by helpers at Winter Fest!
HAT_25_FLAVORTEXT: It may look like just a winter hat, but it is actually a MAGICAL winter hat!
HAT_26_FLAVORTEXT: This stylish hat is intended to be worn at formal gatherings, but you can wear it anywhere you want.
HAT_27_FLAVORTEXT: Need to keep your ears warm, but your hair neat? Try these earmuffs on!
HAT_29_FLAVORTEXT: If you've ever needed to look like a reindeer, this is the hat for you!
HAT_30_FLAVORTEXT: A large snowman mask, and it's even made out of snow! Brrrr!
HAT_31_FLAVORTEXT: Legend says that those who wear can hear the songs of dragons. Often its wearers can be heard singing to themselves.
HAT_32_FLAVORTEXT: When they grow into adults, Frost Saber Cats choose a new form. This one chose to be a hat for some reason.
HAT_33_FLAVORTEXT: A magical hat crafted by the magical creatures in Firefly Forest.
HAT_34_FLAVORTEXT: Some say that if the correct words are spoken, this tiara will spit flames. Be careful what you say while wearing it!
HAT_35_FLAVORTEXT: Formerly worn by Eustace Redhale "The King of Dragons" and the last ruler to ride one. It has the power of dragon's fire.
HAT_36_FLAVORTEXT: The hat of one of the greatest wizards in the Academy.
HAT_37_FLAVORTEXT: The Shiverchill Tribes wear this hat during important ceremonies like the "Welcome to Winter" and "Tobogganing Tuesdays".
HAT_38_FLAVORTEXT: A celebratory hat worn by the people of Spire on feast days. You can store a lot of food in it if you're sneaky.
HAT_39_FLAVORTEXT: The choice of pirate captains everywhere! It smells like the sea and comes with a cool-looking eye patch!
HAT_40_FLAVORTEXT: The favorite head gear of scurvy dogs because it's very absorbent and pirates love polka dots.
HAT_41_FLAVORTEXT: This is the hat worn by the Skyfolk - the small creatures who live in the clouds above the Academy.
HAT_42_FLAVORTEXT: Mira's hood radiates a powerful energy...
HAT_43_FLAVORTEXT: A fashionable hat worn by initiates in the Oasis Institute of Natural Creatures (OINC).
HAT_44_FLAVORTEXT: This hat is rumored to have been worn by Looter Dan, the Academy's greatest explorer.
HAT_45_FLAVORTEXT: An old hat, probably worn by the people who built the ancient city.
HAT_46_FLAVORTEXT: You aren't a robot, but this hat sure makes you look like one!
HAT_47_FLAVORTEXT: These headphones are used to enhance the dancing skills of the TEK-Y4 dancing robots!
HAT_48_FLAVORTEXT: This actually smells like a pumpkin! Kind of sweaty, though.
HAT_49_FLAVORTEXT: A Luminite mask...pretty well-made, I think!
HAT_50_FLAVORTEXT: The hood of a creepy specter - a bit dingy, but that just makes it even creepier.
HAT_51_FLAVORTEXT: A mask of Franky the Stein, the popular TV monster.
HAT_52_FLAVORTEXT: A mask of a skelly..... ooooo scary!
HAT_53_FLAVORTEXT: A wolf mask... howl at the moon awhooooo!
HAT_54_FLAVORTEXT: A thick, durable knitted toque, perfect for braving the harsh mountain conditions.
HAT_55_FLAVORTEXT: A standard viking helmet, but with wings! Who cares if they don't make you fly, they're wings!
HAT_56_FLAVORTEXT: The helm of the great Frost Beard. Causes the wearer to grow a beard of ice.
HAT_57_FLAVORTEXT: A Yeti mask...but it's really cute!
HAT_59_FLAVORTEXT: This relic from a more technical age seems to be restored perfectly...it even has that new car smell!
HAT_60_FLAVORTEXT: A strange feeling overwhelms you when you put on this hood; it makes you feel...mysterious.
HAT_61_FLAVORTEXT: This helm was worn by the warrior wizards of legend - meant only for those who passed the toughest of tests.
HAT_62_FLAVORTEXT: This helm is worn only by the greatest of Bounty Hunters. Its staring gaze strikes fear into the hearts of all who see it!
HAT_63_FLAVORTEXT: The standard-issue hat of a Bounty Hunter. It is durable enough to wear in a storm and provides excellent visibility.
HAT_64_FLAVORTEXT: The hat from a bee costume. It smells faintly of flowers.
HAT_65_FLAVORTEXT: The magical flame on this helmet can never be extinguished.
HAT_66_FLAVORTEXT: A helmet crafted by Big Hex's creator, the Warden who studied in Skywatch.
HAT_67_FLAVORTEXT: If Arctursus ever found someone lost in the mountains, he would shed some ice fur and create this hood out of it to keep them warm.
HAT_68_FLAVORTEXT: This bonnet was grown in a Warden's garden in Firefly Forest.
HAT_69_FLAVORTEXT: Townsfolk that live on the shore crafted this diving toque in honor of the sea guardian Diveodile.
HAT_70_FLAVORTEXT: This helmet was crafted out of cooled lava from Bonfire Spire.
HAT_71_FLAVORTEXT: Perfect for your prickly personality. Poke! Poke!! Poke!!!
HAT_72_FLAVORTEXT: This hood is no yolk! It is said that it was once worn by the bravest of warriors!
HAT_74_FLAVORTEXT: A snowflake fell from the skies and landed on your head. At least, that's what you can tell everyone.
HAT_75_FLAVORTEXT: Whatever the weather, this hat's got you covered!
HAT_76_FLAVORTEXT: Great for adventure on the high seas!
HAT_77_FLAVORTEXT: Ceremonial hat inspired by magical jellyfish.
HAT_78_FLAVORTEXT: It's so old that it won't help you breathe underwater anymore, but it's still sturdy.
HAT_79_FLAVORTEXT: This sleek hat will make you look sharp as a shark's fin!
HAT_80_FLAVORTEXT: This old hat belonged to the admiral who led the charge against the evil Order of Influence many years ago.
HAT_81_FLAVORTEXT: This sturdy helmet has been forged under the pressure of deep ocean water.
HAT_82_FLAVORTEXT: Wearing this will make you look like a fun girl or a fun guy!
HAT_83_FLAVORTEXT: The brim of this helmet is made from a hard-to-find nut that grows deep within Firefly Forest.
HAT_84_FLAVORTEXT: Helm forged from ice found at the top of Shiverchill Mountain.
HAT_85_FLAVORTEXT: The Wing Guard patrolled the skies to protect the machinery of Skywatch from people trying to mess with the weather. That is, until the Puppet Master appeared.
HAT_86_FLAVORTEXT: This surprisingly soft hat will keep you cool in the kitchen.
HAT_87_FLAVORTEXT: This goofy goblin mask is a favorite costume among young wizards during Pumpkinfest.
HAT_88_FLAVORTEXT: Don't be scared! Unless you're a crow, that is!
HAT_89_FLAVORTEXT: This classic Pumpkinfest look from ancient Egypt is sure to spook your friends!
HAT_90_FLAVORTEXT: Allows you to hide in a pile of leaves like fairies from the Autumn King's court.
HAT_92_FLAVORTEXT: The fierce gaze of dragons protects you.
HAT_93_FLAVORTEXT: Feel as commanding as a dragon, or just say you are a dragoncorn.
HAT_94_FLAVORTEXT: This rare crown is formed from Ice Dragon teeth, giving you extra life!
HAT_95_FLAVORTEXT: The ultimate cap for wavy hair, from Tidus, prince of the waves!
HAT_96_FLAVORTEXT: The two heads of Chill & Char combined into one helmet. Now you can look both Cool and Hot at the same time!
HAT_97_FLAVORTEXT: The radiance of the sun shines from your head with this helmet inspired by Luma and her love of the sun.
HAT_98_FLAVORTEXT: This helm was made from scales that Eclipse shed a long time ago, and adorned with his moon symbol.
HAT_99_FLAVORTEXT: Full steam ahead! Command the skies with this time tracking captain's cap.
HAT_100_FLAVORTEXT: Gear up with bright flowers and shiny brass fittings. Practical and pretty!
HAT_101_FLAVORTEXT: Bee Bah Boo! Go Team Blue!
HAT_102_FLAVORTEXT: Protect your head! Go Team Red!
HAT_103_FLAVORTEXT: The warmest hat in the land, with the hottest fashion. Perfect for sipping cocoa on a mountaintop. Part of the elite Ice Crystal set.

KEY_1_FLAVORTEXT: Use this special shovel to play the Dyno Dig game where you can dig up Dyno fossils to fill the museum.
KEY_2_FLAVORTEXT: A dancing robot with a neural network processor for dance move acceleration and increased groove accuracy.
KEY_3_FLAVORTEXT: An emerald representing your mastery of Flora's trials in Firefly Forest.
KEY_4_FLAVORTEXT: A diamond representing your aid in Bok's woes in the Shiverchill Mountains.
KEY_5_FLAVORTEXT: This bounty note means you have accepted the 1st bounty for today. Check the bounty section of the Awards Menu for details.
KEY_6_FLAVORTEXT: This bounty note means you have accepted the 2nd bounty for today. Check the bounty section of the Awards Menu for details.
KEY_7_FLAVORTEXT: This bounty note means you have accepted the 3rd bounty for today. Check the bounty section of the Awards Menu for details.
KEY_8_FLAVORTEXT: A fiery wand that burns away those pesky vines.
KEY_9_FLAVORTEXT: Having trouble with vines that are too thick to burn with your Vine Pruner? Not to worry, here's the Vinecinerator 2000!
KEY_10_FLAVORTEXT: An amethyst representing your adventures during Eugene's pranks in Skywatch.
KEY_11_FLAVORTEXT: A ruby given to you by Slurpy after helping him in his quest to become a chef. This is the Warden Keystone of Bonfire Spire.
KEY_12_FLAVORTEXT: These boots allow the wearer to walk on lava.
KEY_13_FLAVORTEXT: A map of the entire island!
KEY_15_FLAVORTEXT: Used to break up ink blots underwater, this sonic gun was key to helping the pirates defeat the Order of Influence's ancient beast in a war fought long ago.
KEY_16_FLAVORTEXT: Can be used by wizards to take a picture underwater.
KEY_17_FLAVORTEXT: A sapphire given to you for passing Eve's trials and defeating the monster Old One. This is one of the Warden Keystones used to gain access to the Academy.
KEY_22_FLAVORTEXT: An amulet given to you by Gale, the Academy's Keeper. It allows you to enter the Academy.
KEY_24_FLAVORTEXT: A sapphire given to you for passing Eve's trials and defeating the monster Old One. This is one of the Warden Keystones used to gain access to the Academy.

KEY_27_FLAVORTEXT: A diamond representing your aid in Bok's woes in the Shiverchill Mountains.
KEY_28_FLAVORTEXT: An emerald representing your mastery of Flora's trials in Firefly Forest.
MOUNT_1_FLAVORTEXT: Why walk when you can float on a cloud! So soft and fluffy that you could fall asleep.
MOUNT_3_FLAVORTEXT: What's better than a cloud? A rainbow cloud. Keeps you looking happy and cool.
MOUNT_5_FLAVORTEXT: Be a leaf on the wind as you ride this magical flying bush blooming with spring flowers.
MOUNT_6_FLAVORTEXT: Rainy days aren't always bad, especially not if you are riding on top of it with this Storm Cloud.
MOUNT_8_FLAVORTEXT: Ride not only the waves but also all the way to your next quest on this slick surfboard.
MOUNT_9_FLAVORTEXT: When you ride the Clam Shell, you will feel like you are surrounded by all the calming sounds of the ocean.
MOUNT_10_FLAVORTEXT: Show off your collected treasures by riding on this Treasure Chest!
MOUNT_11_FLAVORTEXT: Hop on this floating magical Gold Coin to look for even bigger treasures across the world of Prodigy!
MOUNT_12_FLAVORTEXT: It's a pumpkin, a lantern, and an urn and you're standing in it.
MOUNT_13_FLAVORTEXT: Double, Double toil and trouble, fire burn and cauldron bubble.
MOUNT_14_FLAVORTEXT: Watch out snow and ice! The radest snowboard is out to shred.
MOUNT_15_FLAVORTEXT: The epitome of cool.  You'll be chillin' like a villain on this throne of ice.
MOUNT_16_FLAVORTEXT: All you survey that fly and crawl are now your subjects, maybe, ribbit.
MOUNT_17_FLAVORTEXT: Race thunder clouds across the storm filled skies.
MOUNT_18_FLAVORTEXT: A flying gold medal for those with pep.
MOUNT_19_FLAVORTEXT: A flying silver medal for those with pep.
MOUNT_20_FLAVORTEXT: A flying bronze medal for those with pep.
MOUNT_21_FLAVORTEXT: A seat comfy enough even for the Puppet Master himself.
MOUNT_22_FLAVORTEXT: Your very own fleeting seat of power.
MOUNT_23_FLAVORTEXT: Perfectly curved to a razor edge of blue light.
MOUNT_24_FLAVORTEXT: Slightly chewed floating flower bush that is still cute despite the bite marks.
MOUNT_25_FLAVORTEXT: A floating clawed hand reminiscent of a particularly mischievious pet.
MOUNT_27_FLAVORTEXT: Used by beginner surfers to get an edge over the competition.
MOUNT_28_FLAVORTEXT: You know you are a veteran surfer when sunrise finds you already out on the waves.
MOUNT_29_FLAVORTEXT: Legend has it that when a Gnawdy tried to bite this board, it bit it back.
MOUNT_30_FLAVORTEXT: Sometimes when a star falls it becomes an awesome ride.
MOUNT_31_FLAVORTEXT: Feel the swirl of an entire galaxy beneath your feet.
MOUNT_32_FLAVORTEXT: Mini portals and mini dragons included, you just have to squint really hard.
MOUNT_33_FLAVORTEXT: This giant pocket sized rocket will get you where you need to go in a blast.
MOUNT_34_FLAVORTEXT: Water logged plank from the deepest depths of the sea.
MOUNT_35_FLAVORTEXT: Ancient mystical map of sunken treasure that will take you....somewhere.
MOUNT_36_FLAVORTEXT: Fly like a leaf on an autumn breeze.
MOUNT_37_FLAVORTEXT: The biggest bag of Pumpkin Fest goodies you've ever stood in.
MOUNT_38_FLAVORTEXT: How do you think Yetis' travel up and down their mountains for their famous festival?
MOUNT_39_FLAVORTEXT: A very comfortable ride no matter how cold it gets.
MOUNT_40_FLAVORTEXT: Some say it's made of gold; others, cheese. Both are probably right.
MOUNT_41_FLAVORTEXT: Just be careful you don't fall into one of its secret pockets.
MOUNT_42_FLAVORTEXT: Mystical Racer filled with Moonlight Festival magic which belonged to the wizard who started festivals.
MOUNT_44_FLAVORTEXT: Once used by a mythical race of giants for tea, now you can just ride it wherever you want.
MOUNT_45_FLAVORTEXT: Found deep in the Academy Archives, this book mysteriously floats. Turns out it makes a good ride.
